MSM Analysis

```{r  msm2, cache = TRUE, eval = FALSE}
### MSM ANALYIS BELOW ###
# commenting out model to save time (which I've saved in a file, below)
# initial matrix for transitions
library("msm")

Q0 <- rbind(c(.9, .1),
            c(.1, .9))

# intensity matrix
Q0

head(datis)

datis <- datis%>%
  arrange(Id, yearW)


## IMPT MANIFEST SPIRIT 

crudeinR <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(bs1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = datis,
                      qmatrix = Q0)
ms  <- msm(
  bs1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = datis,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
  gen.inits=TRUE,
  ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE
  # Not running without this assumption.
 # gen.inits = TRUE
)
ms


print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( ms ) , 3 ) )


saveRDS(ms, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","ms.rds" ))




# Initialise
crudeinR <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(bs1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = datS_fill,
                      qmatrix = Q0)
ms_fill  <- msm(
  bs1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = datS_fill,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
  gen.inits=TRUE,
  ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE
  # Not running without this assumption.
 # gen.inits = TRUE
)
ms_fill

print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( ms_fill ) , 3 ) )

print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( ms ) , 3 ) )


saveRDS(ms_fill, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","ms_fill.rds" ))

# MS FILL
```

Transition probabilities (averaged)

```{r}
# read model, (saved to save time)

# note change of model name 
ms <-readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","ms" ))

# DON'T USE 
#ms_fill <-readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","ms_fill.rds" ))


m1 <- ms
#probability matrix
dt<-  print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( m1 ) , 3 ) )

# label cols, rows:
rownames(dt) = c("Not-Believe Spirit time 0", "Believe Spirit time 0")
colnames(dt) = c("Not-Believe Spirit t+1","Believe Spirit t+1")

#table
dt%>%
 kbl(caption = "Hidden Markov Model: inferred population average belief in Spirit state change, years 2009-2021")%>%
  kable_material(c("hover"))
```

LaTeX table

```{r, eval = FALSE}
dt %>%
  kbl(booktabs = T,
      format = "latex",
      caption = "Hidden Markov Model: inferred population average belief in Spirit state change, years 2009-2021")
  
```

```{r  hmmchange, fig.cap="Hidden Markov Model reveals religious change within people differs from the society wide-aggregate trend. As people age, they are more likely to affiliate and less likely to disaffiliate. The population gap comes from greater disaffiliation among young people than affiliation.", echo =FALSE}
# Graph
m1
oz<- as.matrix( msm::pmatrix.msm( m1 ) )
oz <- round(oz, digits = 3)
m1
oz
stateNames <- c("No Belief Spirit (.30)","Belief Spirit (.70)")
row.names(oz) <- stateNames; colnames(oz) <- stateNames
oz
## need to transpose or else arrows go in the wrong direction
toz <- t(oz) 

#library(pracma)
plotmat(toz,
       # pos = c(1,2), 
       # lwd = 1, 
       # box.lwd = 2, 
        cex.txt = 0.9, 
        box.size = 0.09, 
       # box.type = "circle", 
        box.prop = 0.5,
        arr.pos =  0.4, 
        shadow.size = 0.001,
        box.col = c("lightgreen","lightblue","orange"),
       # arr.length=.1,
       # arr.width=.1,
        self.cex = .4,
        self.shifty = -.01,
        self.shiftx = .12,
        main = "Hidden Markov Model reveals low transition to Belief in Spirit \nNew Zealand: N = 53728, years 2010-2021")

# spirit_markov 12 x 9 
```

## Graph

```{r  hmmchange2, cache = TRUE, fig.cap="Hidden Markov Model reveals religious change within people differs from the society wide-aggregate trend. As people age, they are more likely to affiliate and less likely to disaffiliate. The population gap comes from much greater disaffiliation among young people than affiliation.", include = TRUE, code_folding=TRUE}

# note to self, this code can be improved
### CREATE PLOT  ###  CONVERSION AGE PLOT
## 20 year olds

#m1 <-readRDS(here::here( "models","mnm-simpson-paradox-religious-change" ))

p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
p20.Convert <- p20$estimates[1, 2]
p20.Convert.L <- p20$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p20.Convert.U <- p20$U[1, 2]
con.20 <- c(20, p20.Convert, p20.Convert.L, p20.Convert.U)
## 30 year olds
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.Convert <- p30$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p30.Convert.L <- p30$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p30.Convert.U <- p30$U[1, 2]
#combine
con.30 <- c(30, p30.Convert, p30.Convert.L, p30.Convert.U)
## 40 year old
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p40.Convert <- p40$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p40.Convert.L <- p40$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p40.Convert.U <- p40$U[1, 2]
con.40 <- c(40, p40.Convert, p40.Convert.L, p40.Convert.U)
## 50 year old
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p50.Convert <- p50$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p50.Convert.L <- p50$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p50.Convert.U <- p50$U[1, 2]
con.50 <- c(50, p50.Convert, p50.Convert.L, p50.Convert.U)
## 60 year olds
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p60.Convert <- p60$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p60.Convert.L <- p60$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p60.Convert.U <- p60$U[1, 2]
con.60 <- c(60, p60.Convert, p60.Convert.L, p60.Convert.U)
## 70 year olds
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p70.Convert <- p70$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p70.Convert.L <- p70$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p70.Convert.U <- p70$U[1, 2]
con.70 <- c(70, p70.Convert, p70.Convert.L, p70.Convert.U)
### ## 80 year olds
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p80.Convert <- p80$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p80.Convert.L <- p80$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p80.Convert.U <- p80$U[1, 2]
con.80 <- c(80, p80.Convert, p80.Convert.L, p80.Convert.U)
# ### ## 90 year olds
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
# # Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p90.Convert <- p90$estimates[1, 2]
# # set lower bound
p90.Convert.L <- p90$L[1, 2]
p90.Convert.U <- p90$U[1, 2]
con.90 <- c(90, p90.Convert, p90.Convert.L, p90.Convert.U)
# ### create data frame for conversion plot
conplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(con.20, con.30, con.40, con.50, con.60, con.70, con.80, con.90))
colnames(conplot) <-
  c("age", "conv_probability", "conv_lower", "conv_upper")
library(ggplot2)
#library(wesanderson)
#wes_palette("Zissou1", type = c("discrete"))
#library("ggsci")

plot.con <-
  ggplot(aes(
    x = age,
    y = conv_probability,
    ymin = conv_lower,
    ymax = conv_upper
  ),
  data = conplot) + geom_point(stroke = 2, colour = "#d1495b")  +
  geom_linerange(alpha =   1, colour = "#d1495b") +
  geom_smooth(colour = "#d1495b",
              method = "loess",
              se = FALSE)  +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .1)) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Belief in Spirit Transition Probability w/ 95% CI") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Religious (Dis)Belief in God Dynamics in New Zealand: years 2010-2021")
#plot.con
#plot.con
#m1

##### CREAT PLOT FOR DECONVERSION
## 20 year olds
p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p20.decon <- p20$estimates[2, 1]
p20.decon.L <- p20$L[2, 1]
p20.decon.U <- p20$U[2, 1]
decon.20 <- c(20, p20.decon, p20.decon.L, p20.decon.U)
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.decon <- p30$estimates[2, 1]
p30.decon.L <- p30$L[2, 1]
p30.decon.U <- p30$U[2, 1]
decon.30 <- c(30, p30.decon, p30.decon.L, p30.decon.U)
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
p40.decon <- p40$estimates[2, 1]
p40.decon.L <- p40$L[2, 1]
p40.decon.U <- p40$U[2, 1]
decon.40 <- c(40, p40.decon, p40.decon.L, p40.decon.U)
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
p50.decon <- p50$estimates[2, 1]
p50.decon.L <- p50$L[2, 1]
p50.decon.U <- p50$U[2, 1]
decon.50 <- c(50, p50.decon, p50.decon.L, p50.decon.U)
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
p60.decon <- p60$estimates[2, 1]
p60.decon.L <- p60$L[2, 1]
p60.decon.U <- p60$U[2, 1]
decon.60 <- c(60, p60.decon, p60.decon.L, p60.decon.U)
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
p70.decon <- p70$estimates[2, 1]
p70.decon.L <- p70$L[2, 1]
p70.decon.U <- p70$U[2, 1]
decon.70 <- c(70, p70.decon, p70.decon.L, p70.decon.U)
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
p80.decon <- p80$estimates[2, 1]
p80.decon.L <- p80$L[2, 1]
p80.decon.U <- p80$U[2, 1]
decon.80 <- c(80, p80.decon, p80.decon.L, p80.decon.U)
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
p90.decon <- p90$estimates[2, 1]
p90.decon.L <- p90$L[2, 1]
p90.decon.U <- p90$U[2, 1]
decon.90 <- c(90, p90.decon, p90.decon.L, p90.decon.U)

### create data frame for conversion plot
deconplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(
    decon.20,
    decon.30,
    decon.40,
    decon.50,
    decon.60,
    decon.70,
    decon.80,
    decon.90
  ))
colnames(deconplot) <-
  c("age", "decon_probability", "decon_lower", "decon_upper")
library(ggplot2)
plot.decon <-
  ggplot(aes(
    x = age,
    y = decon_probability,
    ymin = decon_lower,
    ymax = decon_upper
  ),
  data = deconplot) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1,
             colour = "#00798c",
             stroke = 2) +   geom_linerange(alpha = 1, colour = "#00798c") +
  #scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,.1))    +
  geom_smooth(colour = "#00798c", se = T) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Spirit DisBelief Transition Probability w/ 95% CI") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Religious (Dis)affiliation Dynamics")  +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

#library(gridExtra)

#grid.arrange(plot.con,plot.decon, ncol=2)
### SUPERIMPOSE
deconplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Dis-Belief", nrow(deconplot)))
conplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Belief", nrow(conplot)))
deconplot2 <- deconplot %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    conv_probability = decon_probability,
    conv_lower = decon_lower,
    conv_upper = decon_upper
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(decon_probability, decon_upper, decon_lower))

comboplot <- rbind(conplot, deconplot2)
#comboplot
# get initial probabilities for title label
#pmatrix.msm(m1)

library(ggplot2)

# plot.combo <-
#   ggplot(
#     aes(
#       x = age,
#       y = conv_probability,
#       ymin = conv_lower,
#       ymax = conv_upper,

#     ),
#     data = comboplot

#   geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
#   geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
#   geom_smooth(se = F) +
#   scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .96))  +
#   labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of Religious (Dis)affiliation w/ 95 CI: range: Pr = 0 to Pr = 1 ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Religious (Dis)affiliation Dynamics in New Zealand: years 2020 -- 2020") +
#   #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
#   scale_colour_manual(values = c("#d1495b", "#00798c")) +
#   theme(legend.position = "bottom")
# plot.combo

library("ggokabeito")   # color palette
 


plotindividual_SPIRIT_30_imp <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .3))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of (Dis)Belief Spirit w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Belief in Spirit Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 53728, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")


plotindividual_SPIRIT_05_imp <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .05))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of (Dis)Belief Spirit w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Belief in Spirit Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 53728, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plotindividual_SPIRIT_05_imp
plotindividual_SPIRIT_30_imp

saveRDS(plotindividual_SPIRIT_30_imp,   here::here(here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "plotindividual_SPIRIT_30_imp")))

  plotindividual_SPIRIT,

## MANIFEST STATE CHANGE MODEL SPIRIT

```{r}
# FILL FORARD DATA 

datS_fill  <- df %>%
  dplyr::filter(YearMeasured == 1 & Wave !=2009) %>% # filtering only people who have responded in a year, no
  droplevels() %>%
  dplyr::select(Wave, Age, Wave, Religious1 , Id, Believe.Spirit, years, GenCohort, Male, Pol.Orient, Urban, Edu,
                Partner, Parent, AGREEABLENESS, CONSCIENTIOUSNESS, OPENNESS,HONESTY_HUMILITY,EXTRAVERSION,
                Religion.Church, NEUROTICISM,SmokerEver,EthnicCats) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(yearW  = as.numeric(Wave) - 1) %>%
  group_by(Id) %>% filter(n() > 1) %>% # have responded to at least 2 x waves
  filter(n() != 0) %>%
  filter(n() != 1) %>%
  ungroup(Id) %>%
  mutate(bs1 = as.numeric(Believe.Spirit))%>%
  mutate( cohort = as.numeric(GenCohort)-1) %>%
  group_by(Id) %>% filter(n() > 1) %>% # have responded to at least 2 x waves
  add_tally(bs1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(Id) %>%
    filter(n > 1) %>%
  ungroup(Id) %>%
  droplevels() %>%
  select(-c(Wave, GenCohort, cohort, n,Believe.Spirit)) %>%
  arrange(  Id, yearW, bs1) %>%
  tidyr::fill(bs1, .direction = 'down') # conservative 

# make all numeric 
datS_fill = as.data.frame(sapply(datS_fill, as.numeric))

```

### BELIEF IN SPIRIT

MSM Analysis

```{r  msm2, cache = TRUE, eval = FALSE}
### MSM ANALYIS BELOW ###
# commenting out model to save time (which I've saved in a file, below)
# initial matrix for transitions
library("msm")

Q0 <- rbind(c(.9, .1),
            c(.1, .9))

# intensity matrix
Q0

head(datis)

datis <- datis%>%
  arrange(Id, yearW)

# Initialise
crudeinR <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(bs1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = datis,
                      qmatrix = Q0)

ms_manifest_state_change <- msm(
  bs1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = datis,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
  gen.inits=TRUE,
  #ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE
  # Not running without this assumption.
 # gen.inits = TRUE
)
ms_manifest_state_change

print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( ms ) , 3 ) )


saveRDS(ms_manifest_state_change, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","ms_manifest_state_change.rds" ))


### FILL METHOD  USE THIS 
crudeinR <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(bs1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = datS_fill,
                      qmatrix = Q0)

ms_manifest_state_change_FILL <- msm(
  bs1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = datS_fill,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
  gen.inits=TRUE,
  #ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE
  # Not running without this assumption.
 # gen.inits = TRUE
)
ms_manifest_state_change_FILL

print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( ms_manifest_state_change_FILL ) , 3 ) )


# ESTIMATES MORE CHANGE
print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( ms_manifest_state_change ) , 3 ) )


saveRDS(ms_manifest_state_change_FILL, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","ms_manifest_state_change_FILL.rds" ))


```

Transition probabilities (averaged)

```{r}
# read model, (saved to save time)
ms_manifest_state_change

# note change of model name 
# USE
ms_manifest_state_change <-readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","ms_manifest_state_change.rds" ))

## DO NOT USE 
#ms_manifest_state_change_FILL <-readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","ms_manifest_state_change_FILL.rds" ))

#m1 <- ms_manifest_state_change

m1 <- ms_manifest_state_change



#probability matrix
dt<-  print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( m1 ) , 3 ) )

# label cols, rows:
rownames(dt) = c("Not-Believe Spirit time 0", "Believe Spirit time 0")
colnames(dt) = c("Not-Believe Spirit t+1","Believe Spirit t+1")

#table
dt%>%
 kbl(caption = "Manifest Markov Model: inferred population average belief in Spirit state change, years 2009-2021")%>%
  kable_material(c("hover"))
```

LaTeX table

```{r, eval = FALSE}
dt %>%
  kbl(booktabs = T,
      format = "latex",
      caption = "Manifest Markov Model: inferred population average belief in Spirit state change, years 2009-2021")
  
```

```{r  hmmchange, fig.cap="Hidden Markov Model reveals religious change within people differs from the society wide-aggregate trend. As people age, they are more likely to affiliate and less likely to disaffiliate. The population gap comes from greater disaffiliation among young people than affiliation.", echo =FALSE}
# Graph
m1
oz<- as.matrix( msm::pmatrix.msm( m1 ) )
oz <- round(oz, digits = 3)
m1
oz
stateNames <- c("No Belief Spirit (.30)","Belief Spirit (.70)")
row.names(oz) <- stateNames; colnames(oz) <- stateNames
oz
## need to transpose or else arrows go in the wrong direction
toz <- t(oz) 

#library(pracma)
plotmat(toz,
       # pos = c(1,2), 
       # lwd = 1, 
       # box.lwd = 2, 
        cex.txt = 0.9, 
        box.size = 0.09, 
       # box.type = "circle", 
        box.prop = 0.5,
        arr.pos =  0.4, 
        shadow.size = 0.001,
        box.col = c("lightgreen","lightblue","orange"),
       # arr.length=.1,
       # arr.width=.1,
        self.cex = .4,
        self.shifty = -.01,
        self.shiftx = .12,
        main = "Manifest Markov Model reveals low transition to Belief in Spirit \nNew Zealand: N = 53728, years 2010-2021")

# spirit_markov 12 x 9 
```

## Graph

```{r  hmmchange2, cache = TRUE, fig.cap="Hidden Markov Model reveals religious change within people differs from the society wide-aggregate trend. As people age, they are more likely to affiliate and less likely to disaffiliate. The population gap comes from much greater disaffiliation among young people than affiliation.", include = TRUE, code_folding=TRUE}

# note to self, this code can be improved
### CREATE PLOT  ###  CONVERSION AGE PLOT
## 20 year olds

#m1 <-readRDS(here::here( "models","mnm-simpson-paradox-religious-change" ))

p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
p20.Convert <- p20$estimates[1, 2]
p20.Convert.L <- p20$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p20.Convert.U <- p20$U[1, 2]
con.20 <- c(20, p20.Convert, p20.Convert.L, p20.Convert.U)
## 30 year olds
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.Convert <- p30$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p30.Convert.L <- p30$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p30.Convert.U <- p30$U[1, 2]
#combine
con.30 <- c(30, p30.Convert, p30.Convert.L, p30.Convert.U)
## 40 year old
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p40.Convert <- p40$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p40.Convert.L <- p40$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p40.Convert.U <- p40$U[1, 2]
con.40 <- c(40, p40.Convert, p40.Convert.L, p40.Convert.U)
## 50 year old
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p50.Convert <- p50$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p50.Convert.L <- p50$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p50.Convert.U <- p50$U[1, 2]
con.50 <- c(50, p50.Convert, p50.Convert.L, p50.Convert.U)
## 60 year olds
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p60.Convert <- p60$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p60.Convert.L <- p60$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p60.Convert.U <- p60$U[1, 2]
con.60 <- c(60, p60.Convert, p60.Convert.L, p60.Convert.U)
## 70 year olds
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p70.Convert <- p70$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p70.Convert.L <- p70$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p70.Convert.U <- p70$U[1, 2]
con.70 <- c(70, p70.Convert, p70.Convert.L, p70.Convert.U)
### ## 80 year olds
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p80.Convert <- p80$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p80.Convert.L <- p80$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p80.Convert.U <- p80$U[1, 2]
con.80 <- c(80, p80.Convert, p80.Convert.L, p80.Convert.U)
# ### ## 90 year olds
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
# # Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p90.Convert <- p90$estimates[1, 2]
# # set lower bound
p90.Convert.L <- p90$L[1, 2]
p90.Convert.U <- p90$U[1, 2]
con.90 <- c(90, p90.Convert, p90.Convert.L, p90.Convert.U)
# ### create data frame for conversion plot
conplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(con.20, con.30, con.40, con.50, con.60, con.70, con.80, con.90))
colnames(conplot) <-
  c("age", "conv_probability", "conv_lower", "conv_upper")
library(ggplot2)
#library(wesanderson)
#wes_palette("Zissou1", type = c("discrete"))
#library("ggsci")

plot.con <-
  ggplot(aes(
    x = age,
    y = conv_probability,
    ymin = conv_lower,
    ymax = conv_upper
  ),
  data = conplot) + geom_point(stroke = 2, colour = "#d1495b")  +
  geom_linerange(alpha =   1, colour = "#d1495b") +
  geom_smooth(colour = "#d1495b",
              method = "loess",
              se = FALSE)  +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .1)) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Belief in Spirit Transition Probability w/ 95% CI") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Religious (Dis)Belief in God Dynamics in New Zealand: years 2010-2021")
#plot.con
#plot.con
#m1

##### CREAT PLOT FOR DECONVERSION
## 20 year olds
p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p20.decon <- p20$estimates[2, 1]
p20.decon.L <- p20$L[2, 1]
p20.decon.U <- p20$U[2, 1]
decon.20 <- c(20, p20.decon, p20.decon.L, p20.decon.U)
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.decon <- p30$estimates[2, 1]
p30.decon.L <- p30$L[2, 1]
p30.decon.U <- p30$U[2, 1]
decon.30 <- c(30, p30.decon, p30.decon.L, p30.decon.U)
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
p40.decon <- p40$estimates[2, 1]
p40.decon.L <- p40$L[2, 1]
p40.decon.U <- p40$U[2, 1]
decon.40 <- c(40, p40.decon, p40.decon.L, p40.decon.U)
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
p50.decon <- p50$estimates[2, 1]
p50.decon.L <- p50$L[2, 1]
p50.decon.U <- p50$U[2, 1]
decon.50 <- c(50, p50.decon, p50.decon.L, p50.decon.U)
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
p60.decon <- p60$estimates[2, 1]
p60.decon.L <- p60$L[2, 1]
p60.decon.U <- p60$U[2, 1]
decon.60 <- c(60, p60.decon, p60.decon.L, p60.decon.U)
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
p70.decon <- p70$estimates[2, 1]
p70.decon.L <- p70$L[2, 1]
p70.decon.U <- p70$U[2, 1]
decon.70 <- c(70, p70.decon, p70.decon.L, p70.decon.U)
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
p80.decon <- p80$estimates[2, 1]
p80.decon.L <- p80$L[2, 1]
p80.decon.U <- p80$U[2, 1]
decon.80 <- c(80, p80.decon, p80.decon.L, p80.decon.U)
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
p90.decon <- p90$estimates[2, 1]
p90.decon.L <- p90$L[2, 1]
p90.decon.U <- p90$U[2, 1]
decon.90 <- c(90, p90.decon, p90.decon.L, p90.decon.U)

### create data frame for conversion plot
deconplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(
    decon.20,
    decon.30,
    decon.40,
    decon.50,
    decon.60,
    decon.70,
    decon.80,
    decon.90
  ))
colnames(deconplot) <-
  c("age", "decon_probability", "decon_lower", "decon_upper")
library(ggplot2)
plot.decon <-
  ggplot(aes(
    x = age,
    y = decon_probability,
    ymin = decon_lower,
    ymax = decon_upper
  ),
  data = deconplot) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1,
             colour = "#00798c",
             stroke = 2) +   geom_linerange(alpha = 1, colour = "#00798c") +
  #scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,.1))    +
  geom_smooth(colour = "#00798c", se = T) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Spirit DisBelief Transition Probability w/ 95% CI") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Religious (Dis)affiliation Dynamics")  +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

#library(gridExtra)

#grid.arrange(plot.con,plot.decon, ncol=2)
### SUPERIMPOSE
deconplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Dis-Belief", nrow(deconplot)))
conplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Belief", nrow(conplot)))
deconplot2 <- deconplot %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    conv_probability = decon_probability,
    conv_lower = decon_lower,
    conv_upper = decon_upper
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(decon_probability, decon_upper, decon_lower))

comboplot <- rbind(conplot, deconplot2)
#comboplot
# get initial probabilities for title label
#pmatrix.msm(m1)

library(ggplot2)

# plot.combo <-
#   ggplot(
#     aes(
#       x = age,
#       y = conv_probability,
#       ymin = conv_lower,
#       ymax = conv_upper,

#   #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +

#   theme(legend.position = "bottom")
# plot.combo

library("ggokabeito")   # color palette
 


plotindividual_SPIRIT_MANIFEST_STATE_CHANGE_30_imp <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .3))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of (Dis)Belief Spirit w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Manifest Markov Model: (Dis)Belief in Spirit Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 53728, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plotindividual_SPIRIT_MANIFEST_STATE_CHANGE_30_imp

  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "i", title = "Hidden Markov Model of (i) Religious Affiliation (ii) Belief in God (iii) Belief in a Spirit in New Zealand, Years 2009/10 - 2021, N > 53,000")
bigplot

## Data Trajectories

```{r}
library(LMest)
relwidelong <-  df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Religious = Religious1 - 1) %>%
  dplyr::select(Id, Religious, Wave)

##THIS HANGS
#out <- with(relwidelong, long2matrices(id = Id, X = Age, Y = Religious))

relwide <- spread(relwidelong, Wave, Religious)
head(relwide)

#relwide<-relwide[complete.cases(relwide), ]

Relidwide <-  df %>%
  dplyr::filter(YearMeasured == 1) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Religious)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Id, Religious, Wave) %>%
  group_by(Id) %>% filter(n() > 11) %>%
  filter(n() != 0) %>%
  ungroup(Id) %>%
  spread(Wave, Religious)

Relidwide <- Relidwide[complete.cases(Relidwide),]
dim(Relidwide)

x_var_list <- names(Relidwide[, 2:13])

Relidwide

library(lcsm)


plot_trajectories(
  data = Relidwide,
  id_var = "Id",
  var_list = x_var_list,
  line_colour = "red",
  xlab = "Years",
  ylab = "Religious",
  connect_missing = F,
  scale_x_num = T,
  scale_x_num_start = 1,
  random_sample_frac = 0.049,
  seed = 1234
 # title_n = T
)  +
  facet_wrap( ~ Id)

```

```{r}
library(LMest)


Relidwide <-  df %>%
  dplyr::filter(YearMeasured == 1 & Wave != 2009) %>%
 # dplyr::filter(!is.na(Religious)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Id, Believe.Spirit, Wave) %>%
  group_by(Id) %>% filter(n() > 8) %>%
  filter(n() != 0) %>%
  ungroup(Id) %>%
  spread(Wave, Believe.Spirit)

#Relidwide <- Relidwide[complete.cases(Relidwide),]
dim(Relidwide)

x_var_list <- names(Relidwide[, 2:12])

Relidwide


plot_trajectories(
  data = Relidwide,
  id_var = "Id",
  var_list = x_var_list,
  line_colour = "red",
  xlab = "Years",
  ylab = "Belief Spirit",
  connect_missing = T,
  scale_x_num = T,
  scale_x_num_start = 1,
  random_sample_frac = 0.011,
  seed = 1234
 # title_n = T
)  +
  facet_wrap( ~ Id)

#spirit_trajectories 16 X9 

```

### MODELS THAT DO NOT ADJUST FOR ATTRITION

#### DATA

```{r}


## IMPUTE RELIGION SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS TIME 8 2016
library(dplyr)


head(df)
all_no_attrition  <- df %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Id,
    Age,
    Wave,
    EthnicCats,
    Employed,
    Urban,
    Edu,
    Male,
    Pol.Orient,
    NZdep,
    Religious1,
    GenCohort,
    Urban,
    TSCORE,
    Partner,
    Parent,
    Religious1,
    Believe.God, 
    Believe.Spirit,
    AGREEABLENESS, 
    CONSCIENTIOUSNESS, 
    OPENNESS,
    HONESTY_HUMILITY,
    EXTRAVERSION,
    NEUROTICISM,
    Religion.Church, 
    SmokerEver,
    YearMeasured
  ) %>%
  group_by(Id) %>%
  dplyr::filter(YearMeasured == 1 & Wave !=2009) %>% # filtering only people who have responded in a year, no
  droplevels() %>%
  group_by(Id) %>% filter(n() > 1) %>% # have responded to at least 2 x waves
  dplyr::filter(YearMeasured != -1 & Wave !=2009) %>% # filtering only people who have responded in a year, no
  dplyr::filter(n() > 1) %>%
  ungroup(Id) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(yearW  = as.numeric(Wave) - 1) %>%
  mutate(bs1 = as.numeric(Believe.Spirit))%>%
  mutate(bg1 = as.numeric(Believe.God))%>%
  group_by(Id) %>% filter(n() > 1) %>% # have responded to at least 2 x waves
  add_tally(bs1) %>%
  dplyr::filter(n > 1) %>%
  dplyr::select(-n) %>%
  add_tally(bg1) %>%
  dplyr::filter(n > 1) %>%
  dplyr::select(-n) %>%
  add_tally(Religious1) %>%
  dplyr::filter(n > 1) %>%
  dplyr::select(-n) %>%
  ungroup(Id) %>%
  droplevels() %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(Wave, YearMeasured,Believe.God ,Believe.Spirit)) %>%
  arrange( Id, yearW)

length(unique(all_no_attrition$Id))
all_no_attrition= as.data.frame(sapply(all_no_attrition, as.numeric))

saveRDS(all_no_attrition, here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "all_no_attrition"))
all_no_attrition <- readRDS( here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "all_no_attrition"))



# bounds for imp 
match("Religious1",names(all_no_attrition))

# bind outcomes to 1 and 2
bounds <- matrix(c(10, 1, 2), nrow = 1, ncol = 3)

all_no_attrition = as.data.frame(all_no_attrition)

dat_no_attrition_r  <- amelia(
  set.seed=1234,
  all_no_attrition, 
  cs= c("Id"),
  ts= c("yearW"),
  m = 5, # number of imputations
  ords = "Religious1",
  noms = c(
    "EthnicCats",  "GenCohort" # preserve categories
  ),
 # idvars=c("Id"), # yrs not working
  lags="Religious1",
  leads="Religious1",
  # polytime = 2, # Allow polynomial
  intercs = F, # 
  bounds = bounds
) # ridge prior if needed see: Amelia pdf documentation p.23

saveRDS(dat_no_attrition_r, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "dat_no_attrition_r"))
dat_no_attrition_r <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "dat_no_attrition_r"))



na_imp_5_r <-as.data.frame(dat_no_attrition_r$imputations$imp1)


saveRDS(na_imp_5_r, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "na_imp_5_r"))
na_imp_5_r <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "na_imp_5_r"))


### BG 

# bounds for imp 
match("bg1",names(all_no_attrition))

# bind outcomes to 1 and 2
bounds <- matrix(c(25, 1, 2), nrow = 1, ncol = 3)

all_no_attrition = as.data.frame(all_no_attrition)

dat_no_attrition_g  <- amelia(
  set.seed=1234,
  all_no_attrition, 
  cs= c("Id"),
  ts= c("yearW"),
  m = 5, # number of imputations
  ords = "bg1",
  noms = c(
    "EthnicCats",  "GenCohort" # preserve categories
  ),
 # idvars=c("Id"), # yrs not working
  lags="bg1",
  leads="bg1",
  # polytime = 2, # Allow polynomial
  intercs = F, # 
  bounds = bounds
) # ridge prior if needed see: Amelia pdf documentation p.23

saveRDS(dat_no_attrition_g, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "dat_no_attrition_g"))
dat_no_attrition_g <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "dat_no_attrition_g"))


na_imp_5_g <-as.data.frame(dat_no_attrition_g$imputations$imp1)


saveRDS(na_imp_5_g, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "na_imp_5_g"))
na_imp_5_g <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "na_imp_5_g"))


### SPIRIT 

### BG 

# bounds for imp 
match("bs1",names(all_no_attrition))

# bind outcomes to 1 and 2
bounds <- matrix(c(24, 1, 2), nrow = 1, ncol = 3)

all_no_attrition = as.data.frame(all_no_attrition)

dat_no_attrition_s  <- amelia(
  set.seed=1234,
  all_no_attrition, 
  cs= c("Id"),
  ts= c("yearW"),
  m = 5, # number of imputations
  ords = "bs1",
  noms = c(
    "EthnicCats",  "GenCohort" # preserve categories
  ),
 # idvars=c("Id"), # yrs not working
  lags="bs1",
  leads="bs1",
  # polytime = 2, # Allow polynomial
  intercs = F, # 
  bounds = bounds
) # ridge prior if needed see: Amelia pdf documentation p.23

saveRDS(dat_no_attrition_s, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "dat_no_attrition_s"))
dat_no_attrition_s <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "dat_no_attrition_s"))

na_imp_5_s <-as.data.frame(dat_no_attrition_s$imputations$imp1)

saveRDS(na_imp_5_s, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "na_imp_5_s"))
na_imp_5_s <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "na_imp_5_s"))



# Random samp for traceplot
out0<- as.character(sample(dat_no_attrition_r$imputations$imp1$Id, 12, replace = FALSE))
out0


# traceplot to inspect's  # chage rows with nr = 6,
tscsPlot(dat_no_attrition_r, cs = c(out0), main = "Religious",
         var = "Religious1",  nr=3, ylim = c(1,2))

# traceplot to inspect's  # chage rows with nr = 6,
tscsPlot(dat_no_attrition_g, cs = c(out0), main = "Belief God",
         var = "bg1",  nr=3, ylim = c(1,2))

tscsPlot(dat_no_attrition_s, cs = c(out0), main = "Belief Spirit",
         var = "bs1",  nr=3, ylim = c(1,2))




```

### NO ATTRITION ADJUSTMENT MSM MODELS

```{r  msm2, cache = TRUE, eval = FALSE}
### MSM ANALYIS BELOW ###
# commenting out model to save time (which I've saved in a file, below)
# initial matrix for transitions
library("msm")

# DATA 
na_imp_5_r <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "na_imp_5_r"))

na_imp_5_g <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "na_imp_5_g"))

na_imp_5_s <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "na_imp_5_s"))

#a_imp_10_r <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_r"))


glm(bs1-1 ~ yearW + (Age), data = na_imp_5_s, family = binomial)



Q0 <- rbind(c(.9, .1),
            c(.1, .9))

# intensity matrix
Q0

# Initialise religion
crudeinR <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(Religious1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = na_imp_5_r,
                      qmatrix = Q0)

# model
na_msm_r_imp1  <- msm(
  Religious1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = na_imp_5_r,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
  ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE,
  # Not running without this assumption.
  gen.inits = TRUE
)

pmatrix.msm(na_msm_r_imp1) 

saveRDS(na_msm_r_imp1, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_r_imp1" ))
na_msm_r_imp1 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_r_imp1" ))


# manifest 
na_msm_r_imp1_man  <- msm(
  Religious1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = na_imp_5_r,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
 # ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE,
  # Not running without this assumption.
  gen.inits = TRUE
)

pmatrix.msm(na_msm_r_imp1_man) 


saveRDS(na_msm_r_imp1_man, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_r_imp1_man" ))
na_msm_r_imp1_man <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_r_imp1_man" ))


## GOD
# Initialise
crudeinR <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(bg1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = na_imp_5_g,
                      qmatrix = Q0)

# model
na_msm_g_imp1  <- msm(
  bg1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = na_imp_5_g,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
  ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE,
  # Not running without this assumption.
  gen.inits = TRUE
)

pmatrix.msm(na_msm_g_imp1) 


saveRDS(na_msm_g_imp1, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_g_imp1" ))
na_msm_g_imp1 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_g_imp1" ))


# manifest 
na_msm_g_imp1_man  <- msm(
  bg1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = na_imp_5_g,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
 # ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE,
  # Not running without this assumption.
  gen.inits = TRUE
)

pmatrix.msm(na_msm_g_imp1_man) 

saveRDS(na_msm_g_imp1_man, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_g_imp1_man" ))
na_msm_g_imp1_man <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_g_imp1_man" ))




### Spirit 
# Initialise
crudeinR <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(bs1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = na_imp_5_s,
                      qmatrix = Q0)

# model
na_msm_s_imp1  <- msm(
  bs1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = na_imp_5_s,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
  ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE,
  # Not running without this assumption.
  gen.inits = TRUE
)

pmatrix.msm(na_msm_s_imp1) 


saveRDS(na_msm_s_imp1, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_s_imp1" ))
na_msm_s_imp1 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_s_imp1" ))



# manifest 
na_msm_s_imp1_man  <- msm(
  bs1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = na_imp_5_s,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
 # ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE,
  # Not running without this assumption.
  gen.inits = TRUE
)

pmatrix.msm(na_msm_s_imp1_man) 

saveRDS(na_msm_s_imp1_man, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_s_imp1_man" ))
na_msm_s_imp1_man <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_s_imp1_man" ))

```

### NO ATTRITION ADJUSTMENT GRPAHS

```{r}
na_msm_r_imp1 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_r_imp1" ))
na_msm_r_imp1_man <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_r_imp1_man" ))



na_msm_g_imp1 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_g_imp1" ))
na_msm_g_imp1_man <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_g_imp1_man" ))


na_msm_s_imp1 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_s_imp1" ))
na_msm_s_imp1_man <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","na_msm_s_imp1_man" ))


m1 <- na_msm_r_imp1
m1 <- na_msm_r_imp1_man

m1 <- na_msm_g_imp1
m1 <- na_msm_g_imp1_man

m1 <- na_msm_s_imp1
m1 <- na_msm_s_imp1_man
  
  
  
p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
p20.Convert <- p20$estimates[1, 2]
p20.Convert.L <- p20$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p20.Convert.U <- p20$U[1, 2]
con.20 <- c(20, p20.Convert, p20.Convert.L, p20.Convert.U)
## 30 year olds
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.Convert <- p30$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p30.Convert.L <- p30$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p30.Convert.U <- p30$U[1, 2]
#combine
con.30 <- c(30, p30.Convert, p30.Convert.L, p30.Convert.U)
## 40 year old
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p40.Convert <- p40$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p40.Convert.L <- p40$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p40.Convert.U <- p40$U[1, 2]
con.40 <- c(40, p40.Convert, p40.Convert.L, p40.Convert.U)
## 50 year old
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p50.Convert <- p50$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p50.Convert.L <- p50$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p50.Convert.U <- p50$U[1, 2]
con.50 <- c(50, p50.Convert, p50.Convert.L, p50.Convert.U)
## 60 year olds
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p60.Convert <- p60$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p60.Convert.L <- p60$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p60.Convert.U <- p60$U[1, 2]
con.60 <- c(60, p60.Convert, p60.Convert.L, p60.Convert.U)
## 70 year olds
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p70.Convert <- p70$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p70.Convert.L <- p70$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p70.Convert.U <- p70$U[1, 2]
con.70 <- c(70, p70.Convert, p70.Convert.L, p70.Convert.U)
### ## 80 year olds
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p80.Convert <- p80$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p80.Convert.L <- p80$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p80.Convert.U <- p80$U[1, 2]
con.80 <- c(80, p80.Convert, p80.Convert.L, p80.Convert.U)
# ### ## 90 year olds
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
# # Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p90.Convert <- p90$estimates[1, 2]
# # set lower bound
p90.Convert.L <- p90$L[1, 2]
p90.Convert.U <- p90$U[1, 2]
con.90 <- c(90, p90.Convert, p90.Convert.L, p90.Convert.U)
# ### create data frame for conversion plot
conplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(con.20, con.30, con.40, con.50, con.60, con.70, con.80, con.90))
colnames(conplot) <-
  c("age", "conv_probability", "conv_lower", "conv_upper")
library(ggplot2)



##### CREAT PLOT FOR DECONVERSION
## 20 year olds
p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p20.decon <- p20$estimates[2, 1]
p20.decon.L <- p20$L[2, 1]
p20.decon.U <- p20$U[2, 1]
decon.20 <- c(20, p20.decon, p20.decon.L, p20.decon.U)
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.decon <- p30$estimates[2, 1]
p30.decon.L <- p30$L[2, 1]
p30.decon.U <- p30$U[2, 1]
decon.30 <- c(30, p30.decon, p30.decon.L, p30.decon.U)
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
p40.decon <- p40$estimates[2, 1]
p40.decon.L <- p40$L[2, 1]
p40.decon.U <- p40$U[2, 1]
decon.40 <- c(40, p40.decon, p40.decon.L, p40.decon.U)
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
p50.decon <- p50$estimates[2, 1]
p50.decon.L <- p50$L[2, 1]
p50.decon.U <- p50$U[2, 1]
decon.50 <- c(50, p50.decon, p50.decon.L, p50.decon.U)
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
p60.decon <- p60$estimates[2, 1]
p60.decon.L <- p60$L[2, 1]
p60.decon.U <- p60$U[2, 1]
decon.60 <- c(60, p60.decon, p60.decon.L, p60.decon.U)
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
p70.decon <- p70$estimates[2, 1]
p70.decon.L <- p70$L[2, 1]
p70.decon.U <- p70$U[2, 1]
decon.70 <- c(70, p70.decon, p70.decon.L, p70.decon.U)
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
p80.decon <- p80$estimates[2, 1]
p80.decon.L <- p80$L[2, 1]
p80.decon.U <- p80$U[2, 1]
decon.80 <- c(80, p80.decon, p80.decon.L, p80.decon.U)
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
p90.decon <- p90$estimates[2, 1]
p90.decon.L <- p90$L[2, 1]
p90.decon.U <- p90$U[2, 1]
decon.90 <- c(90, p90.decon, p90.decon.L, p90.decon.U)

### create data frame for conversion plot
deconplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(
    decon.20,
    decon.30,
    decon.40,
    decon.50,
    decon.60,
    decon.70,
    decon.80,
    decon.90
  ))
colnames(deconplot) <-
  c("age", "decon_probability", "decon_lower", "decon_upper")
library(ggplot2)

#library(gridExtra)

#grid.arrange(plot.con,plot.decon, ncol=2)
### SUPERIMPOSE
deconplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Dis-Belief", nrow(deconplot)))
conplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Belief", nrow(conplot)))
deconplot2 <- deconplot %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    conv_probability = decon_probability,
    conv_lower = decon_lower,
    conv_upper = decon_upper
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(decon_probability, decon_upper, decon_lower))

comboplot <- rbind(conplot, deconplot2)
#comboplot
# get initial probabilities for title label
#pmatrix.msm(m1)


### RELIGIOUS  GRAPHS 
library(ggsci )
library("ggokabeito")   # color palette



plot_na_r_30 <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F, 
             method = "gam",
             formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs", fx = TRUE, k = 7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .3))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of Religious (Dis)Affiliation w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Afilliation Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 52926, years 2010-2021") +
  scale_color_aaas() + 
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_na_r_100 <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F, 
             method = "gam",
             formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs", fx = TRUE, k = 7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of Religious (Dis)Affiliation w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Afilliation Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 52926, years 2010-2021") +
  scale_color_aaas() + 
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

## SPIRIT GRAPHS 


plot_na_s_05 <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F, 
             method = "gam",
             formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs", fx = TRUE, k = 7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .05))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of (Dis)Belief Spirit w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Belief in Spirit Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 52926, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() + 
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_na_s_100_man <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F, 
             method = "gam",
             formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs", fx = TRUE, k = 7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1))  +
 labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of (Dis)Belief Spirit w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Manifest Markov Model: (Dis)Belief in Spirit Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 52926, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_na_s_30_man <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F, 
             method = "gam",
             formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs", fx = TRUE, k = 7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .3))  +
 labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of (Dis)Belief Spirit w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Manifest Markov Model: (Dis)Belief in Spirit Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 52926, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_na_s_30_man
plot_na_s_100_man
plot_na_s_100_man

saveRDS(plot_na_s_30_man, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","plot_na_s_30_man" ))
plot_na_s_30_man <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","plot_na_s_30_man" ))

saveRDS(plot_na_s_100_man, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","plot_na_s_100_man" ))
plot_na_s_100_man <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","plot_na_s_100_man" ))

```

#### GRAPhS

```{r}

# Graphs



rel_god_spirit_compare   <- plot_na_r_12 + plot_na_g_12 + plot_na_s_12  +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "i",
                  title = "Hidden Markov Models of Religious Change",
                # subtitle = "(i) Religious Affiliation (ii) Belief God (iii) Belief Spirit or Life Force"
                  ) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

rel_god_spirit_compare

ggsave(
  rel_god_spirit_compare,
  path = here::here(here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods")),
  width = 22,
  height =10,
  units = "in",
  filename = "rel_god_spirit_compare.jpg",
  device = 'jpeg',
  limitsize = FALSE,
  dpi = 1200
)



# Measurement Error


manifest_hidden <- (plot_na_r_30 + plot_na_r_30_man) /
  (plot_na_g_30 + plot_na_g_30_man) /
  (plot_na_s_30 + plot_na_s_30_man) /
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "i",
                  title = "Comparison of hidden with manifest Markov models reveals bias of manifest models ") +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

manifest_hidden
ggsave(
  manifest_hidden,
  path = here::here(here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods")),
  width = 15,
  height =15,
  units = "in",
  filename = "manifest_hidden.jpg",
  device = 'jpeg',
  limitsize = FALSE,
  dpi = 1200
)


manifest_hidden2 <- (plot_na_r_100 + plot_na_r_100_man) /
  (plot_na_g_100 + plot_na_g_100_man) /
  (plot_na_s_100 + plot_na_s_100_man) /
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "i",
                  title = "Comparison of hidden with manifest Markov models reveals bias of manifest models ") +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

manifest_hidden2

ggsave(
  manifest_hidden2,
  path = here::here(here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods")),
  width = 15,
  height =15,
  units = "in",
  filename = "manifest_hidden2.jpg",
  device = 'jpeg',
  limitsize = FALSE,
  dpi = 1200
)



```

## IMPUTE RELIGION SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS TIME 8 2016

```{r}
all5 <- df %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Id,
    Age,
    Wave,
    EthnicCats,
    Employed,
    Urban,
    Edu,
    Male,
    Pol.Orient,
    NZdep,
    Religious1,
    GenCohort,
    Urban,
    TSCORE,
    Partner,
    Parent,
    Religious1,
    Believe.God, 
    Believe.Spirit,
    AGREEABLENESS, 
    CONSCIENTIOUSNESS, 
    OPENNESS,
    HONESTY_HUMILITY,
    EXTRAVERSION,
    NEUROTICISM,
    Religion.Church, 
    SmokerEver,
    YearMeasured
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Wave == 2016  | Wave == 2017  | Wave == 2018 | 
                  Wave ==2019 | Wave ==2020 ) %>%
  droplevels() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(org2016 =  ifelse(Wave == 2016 & YearMeasured ==1,1,0 ))%>%
  group_by(Id) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(hold = mean(org2016, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  # Hack
  filter(hold>0) %>% # hack to enable repeat of baseline in 2016 
  dplyr::filter(YearMeasured != -1)%>% # remove people who passed away
  ungroup(Id) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Edu = as.numeric(Edu))%>%
  arrange(Id,Wave) %>%
  group_by(Id) %>%
  # dplyr::mutate(dys = (TSCORE_i - min(TSCORE_i)))%>% 
  # dplyr::mutate(yrs =  (dys/365))%>% 
  # dplyr::mutate(wave = as.numeric(Wave)-1) %>% 
   dplyr::mutate(agr_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (as.numeric(AGREEABLENESS)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(agr_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(cs_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (as.numeric(CONSCIENTIOUSNESS)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(cs_bz) %>%
     dplyr::mutate(op_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (as.numeric(OPENNESS)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(op_bz) %>%
     dplyr::mutate(h_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (as.numeric(HONESTY_HUMILITY)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(h_bz) %>%
     dplyr::mutate(ex_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (as.numeric(EXTRAVERSION)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(ex_bz)%>%
     dplyr::mutate(nr_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (as.numeric(NEUROTICISM)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(nr_bz) %>%
     dplyr::mutate(lch_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (as.numeric(log(Religion.Church+1))), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(lch_bz) %>%
  # dplyr::mutate(bs_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (as.numeric(Believe.Spirit)), NA_real_)) %>%
  # fill(bs_bz) %>%
  #   dplyr::mutate(bg_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (as.numeric(Believe.God)), NA_real_)) %>%
  # fill(bg_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(pol_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (Pol.Orient), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(pol_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(rel_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (as.numeric(Religious1)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(rel_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(partner_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (as.numeric(Partner)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(partner_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(parent_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (as.numeric(Parent)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(parent_bz) %>%
  # dplyr::mutate(age_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (Age), NA_real_)) %>%
  # fill(age_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(nzdep_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (NZdep), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(nzdep_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(male_2z = if_else(Wave == "2016", (as.numeric(Male))/2, NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(male_2z)  %>%
  dplyr::mutate(employed_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (as.numeric(Employed)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(employed_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(edu_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (Edu), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(edu_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(ubran_bz = if_else(Wave == "2016", (as.numeric(Urban)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(ubran_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(EthnicCats_b = if_else(Wave == "2016", as.numeric(EthnicCats), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(EthnicCats_b) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(yearW = as.numeric(Wave) - 1) %>%
  arrange(Id, yearW) %>%
  mutate(bg1 = as.numeric(Believe.God) ) %>%
  mutate(bs1 = as.numeric(Believe.Spirit) )%>%
  select(
    -c(
      Wave,
      Male,
      Urban,
      Edu,
      Employed,
      Male,
      NZdep,
      Parent,
      Partner,
      Pol.Orient,
      Religion.Church,
      AGREEABLENESS,
      CONSCIENTIOUSNESS,
      OPENNESS,
      HONESTY_HUMILITY,
      EXTRAVERSION,
      NEUROTICISM,
      YearMeasured,
      EthnicCats,
      hold,
      GenCohort,
      Believe.God,
      Believe.Spirit
    )
  )
head(all5)
saveRDS(all5, here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "all5"))
all5 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "all5"))
countid <-length(unique(all5$Id))

countid
```

### Amelia Imputation Religion GOD SPIRIT

```{r}
head(all5)

# bounds for imp god belief 
match("Religious1",names(all5))

# bind outcomes to 1 and 2
bdsR <- matrix(c(3, 1, 2), nrow = 1, ncol = 3)
bdsR
head(all5)

all5 = as.data.frame(all5)

dat_all_5_r  <- amelia(
  set.seed=1234,
  all5, 
  cs= c("Id"),
  ts= c("yearW"),
  m = 5, # number of imputations
  ords = "Religious1",
  noms = c(
    "EthnicCats_b"  # preserve categories
  ),
 # idvars=c("Id"), # yrs not working
  lags="Religious1",
  leads="Religious1",
  # polytime = 2, # Allow polynomial
  intercs = F, # 
  bounds = bdsR
) # ridge prior if needed see: Amelia pdf documentation p.23

saveRDS(dat_all_5_r, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "dat_all_5_r"))
dat_all_5_r <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "dat_all_5_r"))


# Random samp for traceplot
out0<- as.character(sample(dat_all_5_r$imputations$imp1$Id, 12, replace = FALSE))
out0


# traceplot to inspect's  # chage rows with nr = 6,
tscsPlot(dat_all_5_r, cs = c(out0), main = "Religious",
         var = "Religious1",  nr=3, ylim = c(1,2))

# inspect means
table1::table1( ~ Religious1 |yearW, dat_all_5_r$imputations$imp1)
table1::table1( ~ Religious1 |yearW, all5)


## DOES NOTE ESIMATE AGE CORRECTLY...
a_imp_5_r <-as.data.frame(dat_all_5_r$imputations$imp1)
str(dat_allR)

saveRDS(a_imp_5_r, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_5_r"))
a_imp_5_r <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_5_r"))


#### GOD 

# bounds for imp god belief 
match("bg1",names(all5))

# bind outcomes to 1 and 2
bdg <- matrix(c(25, 1, 2), nrow = 1, ncol = 3)
bdg

all5 = as.data.frame(all5)

dat_all_5_g  <- amelia(
  set.seed=1234,
  all5, 
  cs= c("Id"),
  ts= c("yearW"),
  m = 5, # number of imputations
  ords = "bg1",
  noms = c(
    "EthnicCats_b"  # preserve categories
  ),
 # idvars=c("Id"), # yrs not working
  lags="bg1",
  leads="bg1",
  # polytime = 2, # Allow polynomial
  intercs = F, # 
  bounds = bdg
) # ridge prior if needed see: Amelia pdf documentation p.23

saveRDS(dat_all_5_g, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "dat_all_5_g"))


# Random samp for traceplot
out0<- as.character(sample(dat_all_5_g$imputations$imp1$Id, 12, replace = FALSE))
out0

## DOES NOTE ESIMATE AGE CORRECTLY...
a_imp_5_g <-as.data.frame(dat_all_5_g$imputations$imp1)




saveRDS(a_imp_5_g, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_5_g"))
a_imp_5_g <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_5_g"))


# traceplot to inspect's  # chage rows with nr = 6,
tscsPlot(dat_all_5_g, cs = c(out0), main = "bg1",
         var = "bg1", nr = 3, ylim = c(1,2))

# inspect means
table1::table1( ~ bg1 |yearW, a_imp_5_g)
table1::table1( ~ bg1 |yearW, all5)





#### SPIRIT 


# bounds for imp god belief 
match("bs1",names(all5))

# bind outcomes to 1 and 2
bds <- matrix(c(26, 1, 2), nrow = 1, ncol = 3)
bds

all5 = as.data.frame(all5)

dat_all_5_s  <- amelia(
  set.seed=1234,
  all5, 
  cs= c("Id"),
  ts= c("yearW"),
  m = 5, # number of imputations
  ords = "bs1",
  noms = c(
    "EthnicCats_b"  # preserve categories
  ),
 # idvars=c("Id"), # yrs not working
  lags="bs1",
  leads="bs1",
  # polytime = 2, # Allow polynomial
  intercs = F, # 
  bounds = bds
) # ridge prior if needed see: Amelia pdf documentation p.23

saveRDS(dat_all_5_s, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "dat_all_5_s"))


# Random samp for traceplot
out0<- as.character(sample(dat_all_5_s$imputations$imp1$Id, 12, replace = FALSE))
out0

## DOES NOTE ESIMATE AGE CORRECTLY...
a_imp_5_s <-as.data.frame(dat_all_5_s$imputations$imp1)
str(a_imp_5_s)

head(a_imp_5_s)


# traceplot to inspect's  # chage rows with nr = 6,
tscsPlot(dat_all_5_s, cs = c(out0), main = "bs1",
         var = "bs1", nr = 3, ylim = c(1,2))

# inspect means
table1::table1( ~ bg1 |yearW, a_imp_5_s)
table1::table1( ~ bg1 |yearW, all5)


saveRDS(a_imp_5_s, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_5_s"))
a_imp_5_s <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_5_s"))

```

### DATA SET FOR MISSING 10 YEARS

```{r}
# TRY 9 

# note education is not part of this wave 

all_god_10 <- df %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Id,
    Age,
    Wave,
    EthnicCats,
    Employed,
    Urban,
    Edu,
    Male,
    Pol.Orient,
    NZdep,
    Religious1,
    GenCohort,
    Urban,
    TSCORE,
    Partner,
    Parent,
    Religious1,
    Believe.God, 
    Believe.Spirit,
    AGREEABLENESS, 
    CONSCIENTIOUSNESS, 
    OPENNESS,
    HONESTY_HUMILITY,
    EXTRAVERSION,
    NEUROTICISM,
    Religion.Church, 
    SmokerEver,
    YearMeasured
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Wave !=2009 ) %>%
  droplevels() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(org2010 =  ifelse(Wave == 2010 & YearMeasured ==1,1,0 ))%>%
  group_by(Id) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(hold = mean(org2010, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  # Hack
  filter(hold>0) %>% # hack to enable repeat of baseline in 2016 
  dplyr::filter(YearMeasured != -1)%>% # remove people who passed away
  ungroup(Id) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Edu = as.numeric(Edu))%>%
  arrange(Id,Wave) %>%
  group_by(Id) %>%
   dplyr::mutate(agr_bz = if_else(Wave == "2010", (as.numeric(AGREEABLENESS)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(agr_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(cs_bz = if_else(Wave == "2010", (as.numeric(CONSCIENTIOUSNESS)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(cs_bz) %>%
     dplyr::mutate(op_bz = if_else(Wave == "2010", (as.numeric(OPENNESS)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(op_bz) %>%
     dplyr::mutate(h_bz = if_else(Wave == "2010", (as.numeric(HONESTY_HUMILITY)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(h_bz) %>%
     dplyr::mutate(ex_bz = if_else(Wave == "2010", (as.numeric(EXTRAVERSION)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(ex_bz)%>%
     dplyr::mutate(nr_bz = if_else(Wave == "2010", (as.numeric(NEUROTICISM)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(nr_bz) %>%
     dplyr::mutate(lch_bz = if_else(Wave == "2010", (as.numeric(log(Religion.Church+1))), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(lch_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(pol_bz = if_else(Wave == "2010", (Pol.Orient), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(pol_bz) %>%
  # dplyr::mutate(rel_bz = if_else(Wave == "2010", (as.numeric(Religious1)), NA_real_)) %>%
  # fill(rel_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(partner_bz = if_else(Wave == "2010", (as.numeric(Partner)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(partner_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(parent_bz = if_else(Wave == "2010", (as.numeric(Parent)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(parent_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(nzdep_bz = if_else(Wave == "2010", (NZdep), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(nzdep_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(male_2z = if_else(Wave == "2010", (as.numeric(Male))/2, NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(male_2z)  %>%
  dplyr::mutate(employed_bz = if_else(Wave == "2010", (as.numeric(Employed)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(employed_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(edu_bz = if_else(Wave == "2010", (Edu), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(edu_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(ubran_bz = if_else(Wave == "2010", (as.numeric(Urban)), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(ubran_bz) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(EthnicCats_b = if_else(Wave == "2010", as.numeric(EthnicCats), NA_real_)) %>%
  fill(EthnicCats_b) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(yearW = as.numeric(Wave) - 1) %>%
  arrange(Id, yearW) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(bg1 = as.numeric(Believe.God) ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(bs1 = as.numeric(Believe.Spirit) ) %>%
  select(Id, yearW, bg1, bs1, Religious1, EthnicCats_b, ubran_bz,,employed_bz,male_2z,employed_bz,nzdep_bz,parent_bz, 
         partner_bz,pol_bz,lch_bz,nr_bz,ex_bz,h_bz,op_bz,cs_bz,agr_bz,Age) # remove edu_bz



saveRDS(all_god_10, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","all_god_10.rds" ))
```

### Amelia for 10 years

```{r}
all_god_10 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","all_god_10.rds" ))

#### religious 
head(all_god_10)
min(all_god_10$yearW)
summary(all_god_10$Religious1)
length(unique(all_god_10$Id))
head(all_god_10)

match("Religious1",names(all_god_10))

# bind outcomes to 1 and 2
bdsR <- matrix(c(5, 1, 2), nrow = 1, ncol = 3)
bdsR
summary(all_god_10$Religious1)

all_god_10 = as.data.frame(all_god_10)

dat_all_10_r <- amelia(
  set.seed=1234,
  all_god_10, 
  cs= c("Id"),
  ts= c("yearW"),
  m = 5, # number of imputations
  ords = "Religious1",
  noms = c(
    "EthnicCats_b"  # preserve categories
  ),
 # idvars=c("Id"), # yrs not working
  lags="Religious1",
  leads="Religious1",
  # polytime = 2, # Allow polynomial
  intercs = F, # 
  bounds = bdsR
) # ridge prior if needed see: Amelia pdf documentation p.23

saveRDS(dat_all_10_r, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "dat_all_10_r"))

#### TRACE

out0

         var = "Religious1",  nr = 3,  ylim = c(1,2))

# save

a_imp_10_r <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_r"))

####  GOD


head(all_god_10)
min(all_god_10$yearW)
summary(all_god_10$Religious1)
length(unique(all_god_10$Id))

# bounds for imp god belief 
match("bg1",names(all_god_10))

# bind outcomes to 1 and 2
bdsG <- matrix(c(3, 1, 2), nrow = 1, ncol = 3)
bdsG
summary(all_god_10$bg1)

all_god_10 = as.data.frame(all_god_10)

dat_all_10_g  <- amelia(
  set.seed=1234,
  all_god_10, 
  cs= c("Id"),
  ts= c("yearW"),
  m = 5, # number of imputations
  ords = "bg1",
  noms = c(
    "EthnicCats_b"  # preserve categories
  ),
 # idvars=c("Id"), # yrs not working
  lags="bg1",
  leads="bg1",
  # polytime = 2, # Allow polynomial
  intercs = F, # 
  bounds = bdsG
) # ridge prior if needed see: Amelia pdf documentation p.23

saveRDS(dat_all_10_g, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "dat_all_10_g"))

dat_all_10_g <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "dat_all_10_g"))


#### TRACE 

# Random samp for traceplot
out0<- as.character(sample(dat_all_10_g$imputations$imp1$Id, 18, replace = FALSE))
out0


# traceplot to inspect's  # chage rows with nr = 6,
tscsPlot(dat_all_10_g, cs = c(out0), main = "bg1",
         var = "bg1",  nr = 3, ylim = c(1,2))

# inspect means
table1::table1( ~ bg1 |yearW, dat_all_10_g$imputations$imp1)
table1::table1( ~ bg1 |yearW, all5)


## DOES NOTE ESIMATE AGE CORRECTLY...
a_imp_10_g <-as.data.frame(dat_all_10_g$imputations$imp1)

saveRDS(a_imp_10_g, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g"))
a_imp_10_g <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g"))


str(dat_all_10_g)

head(a_imp_g)


## 
a_imp_10_g1 <-as.data.frame(dat_all_10_g$imputations$imp1)
a_imp_10_g2 <-as.data.frame(dat_all_10_g$imputations$imp2)
a_imp_10_g3 <-as.data.frame(dat_all_10_g$imputations$imp3)
a_imp_10_g4 <-as.data.frame(dat_all_10_g$imputations$imp4)
a_imp_10_g5 <-as.data.frame(dat_all_10_g$imputations$imp5)

saveRDS(a_imp_10_g1, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g1"))
saveRDS(a_imp_10_g2, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g2"))
saveRDS(a_imp_10_g3, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g3"))
saveRDS(a_imp_10_g4, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g4"))
saveRDS(a_imp_10_g5, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g5"))

a_imp_10_g1 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g1"))
a_imp_10_g2 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g2"))
a_imp_10_g3 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g3"))
a_imp_10_g4 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g4"))
a_imp_10_g5 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g5"))


#### SPIRIT 

head(all_god_10)
min(all_god_10$yearW)
summary(all_god_10$Religious1)
length(unique(all_god_10$Id))

# bounds for imp god belief 
match("bs1",names(all_god_10))

# bind outcomes to 1 and 2
bds <- matrix(c(4, 1, 2), nrow = 1, ncol = 3)
bds
summary(all_god_10$bs1)

all_god_10 = as.data.frame(all_god_10)

dat_all_10_s  <- amelia(
  set.seed=1234,
  all_god_10, 
  cs= c("Id"),
  ts= c("yearW"),
  m = 5, # number of imputations
  ords = "bs1",
  noms = c(
    "EthnicCats_b"  # preserve categories
  ),
 # idvars=c("Id"), # yrs not working
  lags="bs1",
  leads="bs1",
  # polytime = 2, # Allow polynomial
  intercs = F, # 
  bounds = bds
) # ridge prior if needed see: Amelia pdf documentation p.23

saveRDS(dat_all_10_s, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "dat_all_10_s"))
dat_all_10_s <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "dat_all_10_s"))


#### TRACE 

# Random samp for traceplot
out0<- as.character(sample(dat_all_10_s$imputations$imp1$Id, 12, replace = FALSE))
out0

dev.off()

# traceplot to inspect's  # chage rows with nr = 6,
tscsPlot(dat_all_10_s, cs = c(out0), main = "bs1",
         var = "bs1",  nr = 3, ylim = c(1,2))

# inspect means
table1::table1( ~ as.factor(bs1 )|yearW, dat_all_10_s$imputations$imp1)
table1::table1( ~ as.factor(bs1) |yearW, all5)


## DOES NOTE ESIMATE AGE CORRECTLY...
a_imp_10_s <-as.data.frame(dat_all_10_s$imputations$imp1)
str(a_imp_10_s)


saveRDS(a_imp_10_s, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s"))
a_imp_10_s <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s"))



## 
a_imp_10_s1 <-as.data.frame(dat_all_10_s$imputations$imp1)
a_imp_10_s2 <-as.data.frame(dat_all_10_s$imputations$imp2)
a_imp_10_s3 <-as.data.frame(dat_all_10_s$imputations$imp3)
a_imp_10_s4 <-as.data.frame(dat_all_10_s$imputations$imp4)
a_imp_10_s5 <-as.data.frame(dat_all_10_s$imputations$imp5)

saveRDS(a_imp_10_s1, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s1"))
saveRDS(a_imp_10_s2, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s2"))
saveRDS(a_imp_10_s3, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s3"))
saveRDS(a_imp_10_s4, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s4"))
saveRDS(a_imp_10_s5, here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s5"))

a_imp_10_s1 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s1"))
a_imp_10_s2 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s2"))
a_imp_10_s3 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s3"))
a_imp_10_s4 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s4"))
a_imp_10_s5 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s5"))

```

### HIDDEN MARKOV RELIGIOUS AMELIA

```{r  msm2, cache = TRUE, eval = FALSE}
### MSM ANALYIS BELOW ###
# commenting out model to save time (which I've saved in a file, below)
# initial matrix for transitions
library("msm")

# DATA 
a_imp_5_r <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_5_r"))
a_imp_10_r <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_r"))
a_imp_10_g <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g"))
a_imp_10_s <- readRDS( here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s"))



## USE 

a_imp_10_r1 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_r1"))
a_imp_10_r2 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_r2"))
a_imp_10_r3 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_r3"))
a_imp_10_r4 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_r4"))
a_imp_10_r5 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_r5"))




a_imp_10_g1 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g1"))
a_imp_10_g2 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g2"))
a_imp_10_g3 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g3"))
a_imp_10_g4 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g4"))
a_imp_10_g5 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g5"))







a_imp_10_s1 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s1"))
a_imp_10_s2 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s2"))
a_imp_10_s3 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s3"))
a_imp_10_s4 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s4"))
a_imp_10_s5 <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s5"))


# for markov


Q0 <- rbind(c(.9, .1),
            c(.1, .9))

# intensity matrix
Q0

# Initialise
crudeinR1 <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(Religious1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = a_imp_10_r1,
                      qmatrix = Q0)

# model
msm_10_r_imp1  <- msm(
  Religious1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = a_imp_10_r1,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR1,
  ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE,
  # Not running without this assumption.
  gen.inits = TRUE
)

msm_10_r_MAN_imp1  <- msm(
  Religious1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = a_imp_10_r1,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR1,
 # ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE,
  # Not running without this assumption.
  gen.inits = TRUE
)

save_here(msm_10_r_MAN_imp1,"msm_10_r_MAN_imp1")

# model2

crudeinR2 <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(Religious1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = a_imp_10_r2,
                      qmatrix = Q0)


msm_10_r_imp2  <- msm(
  Religious1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = a_imp_10_r2,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR2,
  ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE,
  # Not running without this assumption.
  gen.inits = TRUE
)




msm_10_r_MAN_imp2  <- msm(
  Religious1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = a_imp_10_r2,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR2,
 # ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE,
  # Not running without this assumption.
  gen.inits = TRUE
)

save_here( msm_10_r_MAN_imp2, "msm_10_r_MAN_imp2")



# model 3

crudeinR3 <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(Religious1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = a_imp_10_r3,
                      qmatrix = Q0)


msm_10_r_imp3  <- msm(
  Religious1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = a_imp_10_r3,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR3,
  ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE,
  # Not running without this assumption.
  gen.inits = TRUE
)



msm_10_r_MAN_imp3  <- msm(

  Id,

  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR3,
 # ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE,
  # Not running without this assumption.
  gen.inits = TRUE
)

save_here( msm_10_r_MAN_imp3, "msm_10_r_MAN_imp3")


# model 4

crudeinR4 <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(Religious1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = a_imp_10_r4,
                      qmatrix = Q0)


msm_10_r_imp4  <- msm(

  Id,

 # ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),

# model 5

  msm::crudeinits.msm(Religious1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = a_imp_10_r5,
                      qmatrix = Q0)

msm_10_r_imp5  <- msm(

  Id,
  data = a_imp_10_r5,

)

saveRDS(msm_10_r_imp1, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_r_imp1" ))
saveRDS(msm_10_r_imp2, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_r_imp2" ))
saveRDS(msm_10_r_imp3, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_r_imp3" ))

saveRDS(msm_10_r_imp5, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_r_imp5" ))



msm_10_r_imp1 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_r_imp1" ))
msm_10_r_imp2 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_r_imp2" ))
msm_10_r_imp3 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_r_imp3" ))
msm_10_r_imp4 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_r_imp4" ))

msm_10_g_imp3 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_g_imp3" ))
msm_10_g_imp4 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_g_imp4" ))

## SPIRIT 

# Initialise
crudein_s1 <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(bs1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = a_imp_10_s1,
                      qmatrix = Q0)

# model
msm_10_s_imp1  <- msm(
  bs1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = a_imp_10_s1,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudein_s1,
  ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE,
  # Not running without this assumption.
  gen.inits = TRUE
)


msm_10_s_MAN_imp1  <- msm(
  bs1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = a_imp_10_s1,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudein_s1,
  #ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE,
  # Not running without this assumption.
  gen.inits = TRUE
)

save_here( msm_10_s_MAN_imp1, "msm_10_s_MAN_imp1")

                      qmatrix = Q0)

)

## OLD



# Initialise
crudeinR1 <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(Religious1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = a_imp_10_r,
                      qmatrix = Q0)





# model
msm_10_r_imp1 <- msm(
  Religious1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = a_imp_10_r1,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR1,
  ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE,
  # Not running without this assumption.
  gen.inits = TRUE
)
saveRDS(msm_10_r_imp1, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_r_imp1.rds" ))
