### IMPUTATION COMPARE GRAPHS RELIGION

```{r}
msm_10_r_imp1 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_r_imp1" ))
msm_10_r_imp2 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_r_imp2" ))
msm_10_r_imp3 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_r_imp3" ))
msm_10_r_imp4 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_r_imp4" ))
msm_10_r_imp5 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_r_imp5" ))

m1<- msm_10_r_imp1
m1<- msm_10_r_imp2
m1<- msm_10_r_imp3
m1<- msm_10_r_imp4
m1<- msm_10_r_imp5

msm_10_r_imp1


p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
p20.Convert <- p20$estimates[1, 2]
p20.Convert.L <- p20$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p20.Convert.U <- p20$U[1, 2]
con.20 <- c(20, p20.Convert, p20.Convert.L, p20.Convert.U)
## 30 year olds
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.Convert <- p30$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p30.Convert.L <- p30$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p30.Convert.U <- p30$U[1, 2]
#combine
con.30 <- c(30, p30.Convert, p30.Convert.L, p30.Convert.U)
## 40 year old
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p40.Convert <- p40$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p40.Convert.L <- p40$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p40.Convert.U <- p40$U[1, 2]
con.40 <- c(40, p40.Convert, p40.Convert.L, p40.Convert.U)
## 50 year old
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p50.Convert <- p50$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p50.Convert.L <- p50$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p50.Convert.U <- p50$U[1, 2]
con.50 <- c(50, p50.Convert, p50.Convert.L, p50.Convert.U)
## 60 year olds
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p60.Convert <- p60$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p60.Convert.L <- p60$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p60.Convert.U <- p60$U[1, 2]
con.60 <- c(60, p60.Convert, p60.Convert.L, p60.Convert.U)
## 70 year olds
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p70.Convert <- p70$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p70.Convert.L <- p70$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p70.Convert.U <- p70$U[1, 2]
con.70 <- c(70, p70.Convert, p70.Convert.L, p70.Convert.U)
### ## 80 year olds
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p80.Convert <- p80$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p80.Convert.L <- p80$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p80.Convert.U <- p80$U[1, 2]
con.80 <- c(80, p80.Convert, p80.Convert.L, p80.Convert.U)
# ### ## 90 year olds
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
# # Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p90.Convert <- p90$estimates[1, 2]
# # set lower bound
p90.Convert.L <- p90$L[1, 2]
p90.Convert.U <- p90$U[1, 2]
con.90 <- c(90, p90.Convert, p90.Convert.L, p90.Convert.U)
# ### create data frame for conversion plot
conplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(con.20, con.30, con.40, con.50, con.60, con.70, con.80, con.90))
colnames(conplot) <-
  c("age", "conv_probability", "conv_lower", "conv_upper")
library(ggplot2)
#library(wesanderson)
#wes_palette("Zissou1", type = c("discrete"))
#library("ggsci")

##### CREAT PLOT FOR DECONVERSION
## 20 year olds
p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p20.decon <- p20$estimates[2, 1]
p20.decon.L <- p20$L[2, 1]
p20.decon.U <- p20$U[2, 1]
decon.20 <- c(20, p20.decon, p20.decon.L, p20.decon.U)
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.decon <- p30$estimates[2, 1]
p30.decon.L <- p30$L[2, 1]
p30.decon.U <- p30$U[2, 1]
decon.30 <- c(30, p30.decon, p30.decon.L, p30.decon.U)
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
p40.decon <- p40$estimates[2, 1]
p40.decon.L <- p40$L[2, 1]
p40.decon.U <- p40$U[2, 1]
decon.40 <- c(40, p40.decon, p40.decon.L, p40.decon.U)
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
p50.decon <- p50$estimates[2, 1]
p50.decon.L <- p50$L[2, 1]
p50.decon.U <- p50$U[2, 1]
decon.50 <- c(50, p50.decon, p50.decon.L, p50.decon.U)
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
p60.decon <- p60$estimates[2, 1]
p60.decon.L <- p60$L[2, 1]
p60.decon.U <- p60$U[2, 1]
decon.60 <- c(60, p60.decon, p60.decon.L, p60.decon.U)
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
p70.decon <- p70$estimates[2, 1]
p70.decon.L <- p70$L[2, 1]
p70.decon.U <- p70$U[2, 1]
decon.70 <- c(70, p70.decon, p70.decon.L, p70.decon.U)
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
p80.decon <- p80$estimates[2, 1]
p80.decon.L <- p80$L[2, 1]
p80.decon.U <- p80$U[2, 1]
decon.80 <- c(80, p80.decon, p80.decon.L, p80.decon.U)
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
p90.decon <- p90$estimates[2, 1]
p90.decon.L <- p90$L[2, 1]
p90.decon.U <- p90$U[2, 1]
decon.90 <- c(90, p90.decon, p90.decon.L, p90.decon.U)

### create data frame for conversion plot
deconplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(
    decon.20,
    decon.30,
    decon.40,
    decon.50,
    decon.60,
    decon.70,
    decon.80,
    decon.90
  ))
colnames(deconplot) <-
  c("age", "decon_probability", "decon_lower", "decon_upper")
library(ggplot2)

#grid.arrange(plot.con,plot.decon, ncol=2)
### SUPERIMPOSE
deconplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Disaffiliation", nrow(deconplot)))
conplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Affiliation", nrow(conplot)))
deconplot2 <- deconplot %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    conv_probability = decon_probability,
    conv_lower = decon_lower,
    conv_upper = decon_upper
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(decon_probability, decon_upper, decon_lower))

comboplot <- rbind(conplot, deconplot2)



library("ggplot2")
library("patchwork")
```


# POOLED PLOTS 

```{r}
### pooled 
plot_10_r_15_pooled <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = pooled_mean,
      ymin = pooled_mean - pooled_ci,
      ymax = pooled_mean + pooled_ci,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = r_pool_plot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .15))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of Religious (Dis)Affiliation w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Afilliation Pooled Imputation Model",
  subtitle= "N = 4441, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_aaas() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

## WORKS!! 
plot_10_r_15_pooled

save_here(plot_10_r_15_pooled, "plot_10_r_15_pooled")

plot_10_r_35_pooled <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = pooled_mean,
      ymin = pooled_mean - pooled_ci,
      ymax = pooled_mean + pooled_ci,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = r_pool_plot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .35))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of Religious (Dis)Affiliation w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Afilliation Pooled Imputation Model",
  subtitle= "N = 4441, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_aaas() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_10_r_35_pooled

save_here(plot_10_r_35_pooled, "plot_10_r_35_pooled")



### God pooled 



plot_10_g_15_pooled <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = pooled_mean,
      ymin = pooled_mean - pooled_ci,
      ymax = pooled_mean + pooled_ci,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = g_pool_plot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F, 
             method = "gam",
             formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs", fx = TRUE, k = 7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .15))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of Religious (Dis)Belief w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Belief God Pooled Imputation Model",
  subtitle= "N = 4441, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_npg() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_10_g_15_pooled

save_here(plot_10_g_15_pooled,"plot_10_g_15_pooled")


plot_10_g_35_pooled <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = pooled_mean,
      ymin = pooled_mean - pooled_ci,
      ymax = pooled_mean + pooled_ci,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = g_pool_plot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F, 
             method = "gam",
             formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs", fx = TRUE, k = 7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .35))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of Religious (Dis)Belief w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Belief God Pooled Imputation Model",
  subtitle= "N = 4441, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_npg() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_10_g_35_pooled

save_here(plot_10_g_35_pooled,"plot_10_g_35_pooled")


# Spirit


plot_10_s_15_pooled <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = pooled_mean,
      ymin = pooled_mean - pooled_ci,
      ymax = pooled_mean + pooled_ci,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = s_pool_plot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F, 
             method = "gam",
             formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs", fx = TRUE, k = 7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .15))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of (Dis)Belief w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Belief Spirit: Pooled Imputation Model",
  subtitle= "N = 4441, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_10_s_15_pooled

save_here(plot_10_s_15_pooled,"plot_10_s_15_pooled")




plot_10_s_35_pooled <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = pooled_mean,
      ymin = pooled_mean - pooled_ci,
      ymax = pooled_mean + pooled_ci,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = s_pool_plot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F, 
             method = "gam",
             formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs", fx = TRUE, k = 7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .35))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of (Dis)Belief w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Belief Spirit: Pooled Imputation Model",
  subtitle= "N = 4441, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_10_s_35_pooled

save_here(plot_10_s_35_pooled, "plot_10_s_35_pooled")
```




### Pooled manifest grpha 



```{r}
yola

## Religion Manifest pooled 


plot_10_r_35_man_pooled<-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = pooled_mean,
      ymin = pooled_mean - pooled_ci,
      ymax = pooled_mean + pooled_ci,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = r_pool_plot_man
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .35))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of Religious (Dis)Affiliation w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Manifest Markov Model (Dis)Afilliation Imputed",
  subtitle= "N = 4441, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_aaas() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_10_r_35_man_pooled

save_here(plot_10_r_35_man_pooled, "plot_10_r_35_man_pooled")

## God Manifest pooled 

plot_10_g_35_man_pooled <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = pooled_mean,
      ymin = pooled_mean - pooled_ci,
      ymax = pooled_mean + pooled_ci,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = g_pool_plot_man
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F, 
             method = "gam",
             formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs", fx = TRUE, k = 7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .35))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of Religious (Dis)Belief w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Manifest Markov Model: (Dis)Belief in God Imputed",
  subtitle= "N = 4441, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_npg() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
plot_10_g_35_man_pooled

save_here(plot_10_g_35_man_pooled, "plot_10_g_35_man_pooled")


## Spirit manifest pooled

plot_10_s_35_man_pooled <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = pooled_mean,
      ymin = pooled_mean - pooled_ci,
      ymax = pooled_mean + pooled_ci,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = s_pool_plot_man
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F, 
             method = "gam",
             formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs", fx = TRUE, k = 7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .35))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of (Dis)Belief w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Manifest Markov Model: (Dis)Belief in Spirit Imputed",
  subtitle= "N = 4441, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_10_s_35_man_pooled

save_here(plot_10_s_35_man_pooled, "plot_10_s_35_man_pooled")


plot_10_r_35_man_pooled + plot_10_r_35_pooled

```{r}
### IMPUTATION 1

plot_10_r_12_imp1 <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .12))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of Religious (Dis)Affiliation w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Afilliation Imputation 1",
  subtitle= "N = 4441, years 2010-2021") +

### IMPUTATION COMPARE GRAPHS GOD

```{r}
msm_10_g_imp1 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_g_imp1" ))
msm_10_g_imp2 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_g_imp2" ))
msm_10_g_imp3 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_g_imp3" ))
msm_10_g_imp4 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_g_imp4" ))
msm_10_g_imp5 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_g_imp5" ))

m1 <- msm_10_g_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_g_imp2
m1 <- msm_10_g_imp3
m1 <- msm_10_g_imp4
m1 <- msm_10_g_imp5

p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
p20.Convert <- p20$estimates[1, 2]
p20.Convert.L <- p20$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p20.Convert.U <- p20$U[1, 2]
con.20 <- c(20, p20.Convert, p20.Convert.L, p20.Convert.U)
## 30 year olds
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.Convert <- p30$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p30.Convert.L <- p30$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p30.Convert.U <- p30$U[1, 2]
#combine
con.30 <- c(30, p30.Convert, p30.Convert.L, p30.Convert.U)
## 40 year old
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p40.Convert <- p40$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p40.Convert.L <- p40$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p40.Convert.U <- p40$U[1, 2]
con.40 <- c(40, p40.Convert, p40.Convert.L, p40.Convert.U)
## 50 year old
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p50.Convert <- p50$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p50.Convert.L <- p50$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p50.Convert.U <- p50$U[1, 2]
con.50 <- c(50, p50.Convert, p50.Convert.L, p50.Convert.U)
## 60 year olds
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p60.Convert <- p60$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p60.Convert.L <- p60$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p60.Convert.U <- p60$U[1, 2]
con.60 <- c(60, p60.Convert, p60.Convert.L, p60.Convert.U)
## 70 year olds
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p70.Convert <- p70$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p70.Convert.L <- p70$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p70.Convert.U <- p70$U[1, 2]
con.70 <- c(70, p70.Convert, p70.Convert.L, p70.Convert.U)
### ## 80 year olds
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p80.Convert <- p80$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p80.Convert.L <- p80$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p80.Convert.U <- p80$U[1, 2]
con.80 <- c(80, p80.Convert, p80.Convert.L, p80.Convert.U)
# ### ## 90 year olds
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
# # Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p90.Convert <- p90$estimates[1, 2]
# # set lower bound
p90.Convert.L <- p90$L[1, 2]
p90.Convert.U <- p90$U[1, 2]
con.90 <- c(90, p90.Convert, p90.Convert.L, p90.Convert.U)
# ### create data frame for conversion plot
conplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(con.20, con.30, con.40, con.50, con.60, con.70, con.80, con.90))
colnames(conplot) <-
  c("age", "conv_probability", "conv_lower", "conv_upper")
library(ggplot2)
#library(wesanderson)
#wes_palette("Zissou1", type = c("discrete"))
#library("ggsci")

##### CREAT PLOT FOR DECONVERSION
## 20 year olds
p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p20.decon <- p20$estimates[2, 1]
p20.decon.L <- p20$L[2, 1]
p20.decon.U <- p20$U[2, 1]
decon.20 <- c(20, p20.decon, p20.decon.L, p20.decon.U)
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.decon <- p30$estimates[2, 1]
p30.decon.L <- p30$L[2, 1]
p30.decon.U <- p30$U[2, 1]
decon.30 <- c(30, p30.decon, p30.decon.L, p30.decon.U)
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
p40.decon <- p40$estimates[2, 1]
p40.decon.L <- p40$L[2, 1]
p40.decon.U <- p40$U[2, 1]
decon.40 <- c(40, p40.decon, p40.decon.L, p40.decon.U)
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
p50.decon <- p50$estimates[2, 1]
p50.decon.L <- p50$L[2, 1]
p50.decon.U <- p50$U[2, 1]
decon.50 <- c(50, p50.decon, p50.decon.L, p50.decon.U)
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
p60.decon <- p60$estimates[2, 1]
p60.decon.L <- p60$L[2, 1]
p60.decon.U <- p60$U[2, 1]
decon.60 <- c(60, p60.decon, p60.decon.L, p60.decon.U)
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
p70.decon <- p70$estimates[2, 1]
p70.decon.L <- p70$L[2, 1]
p70.decon.U <- p70$U[2, 1]
decon.70 <- c(70, p70.decon, p70.decon.L, p70.decon.U)
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
p80.decon <- p80$estimates[2, 1]
p80.decon.L <- p80$L[2, 1]
p80.decon.U <- p80$U[2, 1]
decon.80 <- c(80, p80.decon, p80.decon.L, p80.decon.U)
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
p90.decon <- p90$estimates[2, 1]
p90.decon.L <- p90$L[2, 1]
p90.decon.U <- p90$U[2, 1]
decon.90 <- c(90, p90.decon, p90.decon.L, p90.decon.U)

### create data frame for conversion plot
deconplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(
    decon.20,
    decon.30,
    decon.40,
    decon.50,
    decon.60,
    decon.70,
    decon.80,
    decon.90
  ))
colnames(deconplot) <-
  c("age", "decon_probability", "decon_lower", "decon_upper")
library(ggplot2)

#grid.arrange(plot.con,plot.decon, ncol=2)
### SUPERIMPOSE
deconplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Disbelief", nrow(deconplot)))
conplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Belief", nrow(conplot)))
deconplot2 <- deconplot %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    conv_probability = decon_probability,
    conv_lower = decon_lower,
    conv_upper = decon_upper
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(decon_probability, decon_upper, decon_lower))

comboplot <- rbind(conplot, deconplot2)


### God plots



plot_10_g_12_imp1 <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F, 
             method = "gam",
             formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs", fx = TRUE, k = 7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .12))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of Religious (Dis)Belief w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Belief Imputation 1",
  subtitle= "N = 4441, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_npg() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

saveRDS(plot_10_g_12_imp5, here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "plot_10_g_12_imp5"))

plot_10_g_12_imp1 <- readRDS(here::here(here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "plot_10_g_12_imp1")))
plot_10_g_12_imp2 <- readRDS(here::here(here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "plot_10_g_12_imp2")))

plot_10_g_12_imp3 <- readRDS(here::here(here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "plot_10_g_12_imp4")))

plot_10_g_12_imp5 <- readRDS(here::here(here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "plot_10_g_12_imp5")))

```

### IMPUTATION COMPARE GRAPHS SPIRIT

```{r}

msm_10_s_imp1 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_s_imp1" ))
msm_10_s_imp2 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_s_imp2" ))
msm_10_s_imp3 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_s_imp3" ))
msm_10_s_imp4 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_s_imp4" ))
msm_10_s_imp5 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_s_imp5" ))


m1 <- msm_10_s_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_s_imp2
m1 <- msm_10_s_imp3
m1 <- msm_10_s_imp4
m1 <- msm_10_s_imp5



p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
p20.Convert <- p20$estimates[1, 2]
p20.Convert.L <- p20$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p20.Convert.U <- p20$U[1, 2]
con.20 <- c(20, p20.Convert, p20.Convert.L, p20.Convert.U)
## 30 year olds
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.Convert <- p30$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p30.Convert.L <- p30$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p30.Convert.U <- p30$U[1, 2]
#combine
con.30 <- c(30, p30.Convert, p30.Convert.L, p30.Convert.U)
## 40 year old
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p40.Convert <- p40$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p40.Convert.L <- p40$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p40.Convert.U <- p40$U[1, 2]
con.40 <- c(40, p40.Convert, p40.Convert.L, p40.Convert.U)
## 50 year old
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p50.Convert <- p50$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p50.Convert.L <- p50$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p50.Convert.U <- p50$U[1, 2]
con.50 <- c(50, p50.Convert, p50.Convert.L, p50.Convert.U)
## 60 year olds
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p60.Convert <- p60$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p60.Convert.L <- p60$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p60.Convert.U <- p60$U[1, 2]
con.60 <- c(60, p60.Convert, p60.Convert.L, p60.Convert.U)
## 70 year olds
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p70.Convert <- p70$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p70.Convert.L <- p70$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p70.Convert.U <- p70$U[1, 2]
con.70 <- c(70, p70.Convert, p70.Convert.L, p70.Convert.U)
### ## 80 year olds
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p80.Convert <- p80$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p80.Convert.L <- p80$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p80.Convert.U <- p80$U[1, 2]
con.80 <- c(80, p80.Convert, p80.Convert.L, p80.Convert.U)
# ### ## 90 year olds
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
# # Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p90.Convert <- p90$estimates[1, 2]
# # set lower bound
p90.Convert.L <- p90$L[1, 2]
p90.Convert.U <- p90$U[1, 2]
con.90 <- c(90, p90.Convert, p90.Convert.L, p90.Convert.U)
# ### create data frame for conversion plot
conplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(con.20, con.30, con.40, con.50, con.60, con.70, con.80, con.90))
colnames(conplot) <-
  c("age", "conv_probability", "conv_lower", "conv_upper")
library(ggplot2)
#library(wesanderson)
#wes_palette("Zissou1", type = c("discrete"))
#library("ggsci")

##### CREAT PLOT FOR DECONVERSION
## 20 year olds
p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p20.decon <- p20$estimates[2, 1]
p20.decon.L <- p20$L[2, 1]
p20.decon.U <- p20$U[2, 1]
decon.20 <- c(20, p20.decon, p20.decon.L, p20.decon.U)
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.decon <- p30$estimates[2, 1]
p30.decon.L <- p30$L[2, 1]
p30.decon.U <- p30$U[2, 1]
decon.30 <- c(30, p30.decon, p30.decon.L, p30.decon.U)
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
p40.decon <- p40$estimates[2, 1]
p40.decon.L <- p40$L[2, 1]
p40.decon.U <- p40$U[2, 1]
decon.40 <- c(40, p40.decon, p40.decon.L, p40.decon.U)
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
p50.decon <- p50$estimates[2, 1]
p50.decon.L <- p50$L[2, 1]
p50.decon.U <- p50$U[2, 1]
decon.50 <- c(50, p50.decon, p50.decon.L, p50.decon.U)
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
p60.decon <- p60$estimates[2, 1]
p60.decon.L <- p60$L[2, 1]
p60.decon.U <- p60$U[2, 1]
decon.60 <- c(60, p60.decon, p60.decon.L, p60.decon.U)
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
p70.decon <- p70$estimates[2, 1]
p70.decon.L <- p70$L[2, 1]
p70.decon.U <- p70$U[2, 1]
decon.70 <- c(70, p70.decon, p70.decon.L, p70.decon.U)
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
p80.decon <- p80$estimates[2, 1]
p80.decon.L <- p80$L[2, 1]
p80.decon.U <- p80$U[2, 1]
decon.80 <- c(80, p80.decon, p80.decon.L, p80.decon.U)
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
p90.decon <- p90$estimates[2, 1]
p90.decon.L <- p90$L[2, 1]
p90.decon.U <- p90$U[2, 1]
decon.90 <- c(90, p90.decon, p90.decon.L, p90.decon.U)

### create data frame for conversion plot
deconplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(
    decon.20,
    decon.30,
    decon.40,
    decon.50,
    decon.60,
    decon.70,
    decon.80,
    decon.90
  ))
colnames(deconplot) <-
  c("age", "decon_probability", "decon_lower", "decon_upper")
library(ggplot2)

#grid.arrange(plot.con,plot.decon, ncol=2)
### SUPERIMPOSE
deconplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Disbelief", nrow(deconplot)))
conplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Belief", nrow(conplot)))
deconplot2 <- deconplot %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    conv_probability = decon_probability,
    conv_lower = decon_lower,
    conv_upper = decon_upper
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(decon_probability, decon_upper, decon_lower))

comboplot <- rbind(conplot, deconplot2)






plot_10_s_12_imp1 <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .12))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of (Dis)Belief Spirit w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Belief Imputation 1",
  subtitle= "N = 4441, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")



plot_10_s_12_imp1


plot_10_s_12_imp2 <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,

  ) +

### OLD GRAPHS

```{r}
# read model, (saved to save time)
msm_5_r_imp1 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_5_r_imp1" ))
msm_10_r_imp1 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_r_imp1" ))

msm_5_r_MAN_imp1 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_5_r_MAN_imp1" ))
msm_10_r_MAN_imp1 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_r_MAN_imp1" ))


msm_10_r_imp1
msm_imp_10_r


msm_10_r_imp1=
### TO KEEP CODE CONSISTENT
m1 <- msm_5_r_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_r_imp1
m1 <- msm_5_r_MAN_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_r_MAN_imp1

pmatrix.msm(msm_10_r_imp1)

#probability matrix
dt<-  print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( m1 ) , 2 ) )
# label cols, rows:
rownames(dt) = c("Not-religious time 0", "Religious time 0")
colnames(dt) = c("Not-religious t+1","Religious t+1")

#table
dt%>%
 kbl(caption = "Hidden Markov Model: inferred population average religious state change, years 2010-2021")%>%
  kable_material(c("hover"))
```

LaTeX table

```{r, eval = FALSE}
dt %>%
  kbl(booktabs = T,
      format = "latex",
      caption = "Hidden Markov Model: inferred population average religious state change, years 2010-2021")
  
```

```{r, eval = FALSE}
out %>%
  kbl(booktabs = T,
      format = "latex",
      caption ="Raw sample religious state change: years 2016-2021")
  
```

```{r, eval=FALSE}
# latex
xtable(out)
```

```{r  hmmchange, fig.cap="Hidden Markov Model reveals religious change within people differs from the society wide-aggregate trend. As people age, they are more likely to affiliate and less likely to disaffiliate. The population gap comes from greater disaffiliation among young people than affiliation.", echo =FALSE}
# Graph
m1 <- msm_5_r_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_r_imp1

m1 <- msm_5_r_MAN_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_r_MAN_imp1


oz<- as.matrix( msm::pmatrix.msm( m1 ) )
oz <- round(oz, digits = 2)


stateNames <- c("Secular (.62)","Religious (.38)")
row.names(oz) <- stateNames; colnames(oz) <- stateNames
oz
## need to transpose or else arrows go in the wrong direction
toz <- t(oz) 
dev.off()
length(unique(a_imp$Id))
m1
#library(pracma)
plotmat(toz,
       # pos = c(1,2), 
       # lwd = 1, 
       # box.lwd = 2, 
        cex.txt = 0.9, 
        box.size = 0.09, 
       # box.type = "circle", 
        box.prop = 0.5,
        arr.pos =  0.4, 
        shadow.size = 0.001,
        box.col = c("lightgreen","lightblue","orange"),
       # arr.length=.1,
       # arr.width=.1,
        self.cex = .4,
        self.shifty = -.01,
        self.shiftx = .12,
        main = "Hidden Markov Model confirms religious switching\nNew Zealand: N = 21936, years 2016-2021")

```

## Graph

```{r}
m1 <- msm_5_r_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_r_imp1

m1 <- msm_5_r_MAN_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_r_MAN_imp1


dev.off()
p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
p20.Convert <- p20$estimates[1, 2]
p20.Convert.L <- p20$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p20.Convert.U <- p20$U[1, 2]
con.20 <- c(20, p20.Convert, p20.Convert.L, p20.Convert.U)
## 30 year olds
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.Convert <- p30$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p30.Convert.L <- p30$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p30.Convert.U <- p30$U[1, 2]
#combine
con.30 <- c(30, p30.Convert, p30.Convert.L, p30.Convert.U)
## 40 year old
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p40.Convert <- p40$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p40.Convert.L <- p40$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p40.Convert.U <- p40$U[1, 2]
con.40 <- c(40, p40.Convert, p40.Convert.L, p40.Convert.U)
## 50 year old
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p50.Convert <- p50$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p50.Convert.L <- p50$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p50.Convert.U <- p50$U[1, 2]
con.50 <- c(50, p50.Convert, p50.Convert.L, p50.Convert.U)
## 60 year olds
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p60.Convert <- p60$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p60.Convert.L <- p60$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p60.Convert.U <- p60$U[1, 2]
con.60 <- c(60, p60.Convert, p60.Convert.L, p60.Convert.U)
## 70 year olds
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p70.Convert <- p70$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p70.Convert.L <- p70$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p70.Convert.U <- p70$U[1, 2]
con.70 <- c(70, p70.Convert, p70.Convert.L, p70.Convert.U)
### ## 80 year olds
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p80.Convert <- p80$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p80.Convert.L <- p80$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p80.Convert.U <- p80$U[1, 2]
con.80 <- c(80, p80.Convert, p80.Convert.L, p80.Convert.U)
# ### ## 90 year olds
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
# # Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p90.Convert <- p90$estimates[1, 2]
# # set lower bound
p90.Convert.L <- p90$L[1, 2]
p90.Convert.U <- p90$U[1, 2]
con.90 <- c(90, p90.Convert, p90.Convert.L, p90.Convert.U)
# ### create data frame for conversion plot
conplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(con.20, con.30, con.40, con.50, con.60, con.70, con.80, con.90))
colnames(conplot) <-
  c("age", "conv_probability", "conv_lower", "conv_upper")
library(ggplot2)
#library(wesanderson)
#wes_palette("Zissou1", type = c("discrete"))
#library("ggsci")

##### CREAT PLOT FOR DECONVERSION
## 20 year olds
p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p20.decon <- p20$estimates[2, 1]
p20.decon.L <- p20$L[2, 1]
p20.decon.U <- p20$U[2, 1]
decon.20 <- c(20, p20.decon, p20.decon.L, p20.decon.U)
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.decon <- p30$estimates[2, 1]
p30.decon.L <- p30$L[2, 1]
p30.decon.U <- p30$U[2, 1]
decon.30 <- c(30, p30.decon, p30.decon.L, p30.decon.U)
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
p40.decon <- p40$estimates[2, 1]
p40.decon.L <- p40$L[2, 1]
p40.decon.U <- p40$U[2, 1]
decon.40 <- c(40, p40.decon, p40.decon.L, p40.decon.U)
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
p50.decon <- p50$estimates[2, 1]
p50.decon.L <- p50$L[2, 1]
p50.decon.U <- p50$U[2, 1]
decon.50 <- c(50, p50.decon, p50.decon.L, p50.decon.U)
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
p60.decon <- p60$estimates[2, 1]
p60.decon.L <- p60$L[2, 1]
p60.decon.U <- p60$U[2, 1]
decon.60 <- c(60, p60.decon, p60.decon.L, p60.decon.U)
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
p70.decon <- p70$estimates[2, 1]
p70.decon.L <- p70$L[2, 1]
p70.decon.U <- p70$U[2, 1]
decon.70 <- c(70, p70.decon, p70.decon.L, p70.decon.U)
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
p80.decon <- p80$estimates[2, 1]
p80.decon.L <- p80$L[2, 1]
p80.decon.U <- p80$U[2, 1]
decon.80 <- c(80, p80.decon, p80.decon.L, p80.decon.U)
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
p90.decon <- p90$estimates[2, 1]
p90.decon.L <- p90$L[2, 1]
p90.decon.U <- p90$U[2, 1]
decon.90 <- c(90, p90.decon, p90.decon.L, p90.decon.U)

### create data frame for conversion plot
deconplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(
    decon.20,
    decon.30,
    decon.40,
    decon.50,
    decon.60,
    decon.70,
    decon.80,
    decon.90
  ))
colnames(deconplot) <-
  c("age", "decon_probability", "decon_lower", "decon_upper")
library(ggplot2)

#grid.arrange(plot.con,plot.decon, ncol=2)
### SUPERIMPOSE
deconplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Disaffiliation", nrow(deconplot)))
conplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Affiliation", nrow(conplot)))
deconplot2 <- deconplot %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    conv_probability = decon_probability,
    conv_lower = decon_lower,
    conv_upper = decon_upper
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(decon_probability, decon_upper, decon_lower))

comboplot <- rbind(conplot, deconplot2)



library(ggplot2)
library(ggsci )

plot_5_r_30 <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .3))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of Religious (Dis)Affiliation w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Afilliation Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 21936, years 2016-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_aaas() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")


plot_5_r_30


plot_5_r_12 <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .12))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of Religious (Dis)Affiliation w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Afilliation Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 21936, years 2016-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_aaas() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_5_r_12

saveRDS(plot_5_r_30, here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "plot_5_r_30"))

### Impute belief in God

Amelia Imputation Religion

### All God Imputation MOdels

```{r  msm2, cache = TRUE, eval = FALSE}
### MSM ANALYIS BELOW ###
# commenting out model to save time (which I've saved in a file, below)
# initial matrix for transitions
library("msm")
a_imp_5_g <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_5_g"))

a_imp_10_g <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_g"))



Q0 <- rbind(c(.9, .1),
            c(.1, .9))

# intensity matrix
Q0

head(a_imp_5_g)

table1::table1( ~ as.factor(bg1) | yearW, data = a_imp_5_g)



# Initialise
crudeinR <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(bg1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = a_imp_5_g,
                      qmatrix = Q0)

msm_5_g_imp1  <- msm(
  bg1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = a_imp_5_g,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
  gen.inits=TRUE,
  ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE
  # Not running without this assumption.
 # gen.inits = TRUE
)

saveRDS(msm_5_g_imp1, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_5_g_imp1" ))
msm_5_g_imp1 <- readRDS( here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_5_g_imp1" ))


print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( msm_5_g_imp1 ) , 3 ) )


### 10 god 

# Initialise
crudeinR <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(bg1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = a_imp_10_g,
                      qmatrix = Q0)

msm_10_g_imp1  <- msm(
  bg1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = a_imp_10_g,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
  gen.inits=TRUE,
  ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE
  # Not running without this assumption.
 # gen.inits = TRUE
)
msm_10_g_imp1
saveRDS(msm_10_g_imp1, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_g_imp1" ))
msm_10_g_imp1 <- readRDS( here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_g_imp1" ))

print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( msm_10_g_imp1 ) , 3 ) )


### MANIFEST MODEL GOD

## 5 year 
a_imp_5_g

crudeinR <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(bg1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = a_imp_5_g,
                      qmatrix = Q0)

msm_5_g_MAN_imp1  <- msm(
  bg1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = a_imp_5_g,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
  gen.inits=TRUE,
 # ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE
  # Not running without this assumption.
 # gen.inits = TRUE
)


saveRDS(msm_5_g_MAN_imp1, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_5_g_MAN_imp1" ))
msm_5_g_MAN_imp1 <- readRDS( here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_5_g_MAN_imp1" ))

print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( msm_5_g_MAN_imp1 ) , 3 ) )



## 10 year 


crudeinR <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(bg1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = a_imp_10_g,
                      qmatrix = Q0)

msm_10_g_MAN_imp1  <- msm(
  bg1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = a_imp_10_g,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
  gen.inits=TRUE,
#  ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE
  # Not running without this assumption.
 # gen.inits = TRUE
)
msm_10_g_MAN_imp1
saveRDS(msm_10_g_imp1, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_g_imp1" ))
msm_10_g_imp1 <- readRDS( here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_g_imp1" ))

print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( msm_10_g_MAN_imp1 ) , 3 ) )
```

Transition probabilities (averaged)

```{r}
# read model, (saved to save time)

# note change of model name 
# USE IMPUTED

msm_5_g_imp1 <- readRDS( here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_g_imp1" ))
msm_10_g_imp1 <- readRDS( here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_g_imp1" ))
msm_5_g_MAN_imp1 <- readRDS( here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_5_g_MAN_imp1" ))
msm_10_g_MAN_imp1 <- readRDS( here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_g_MAN_imp1" ))


m1 <- msm_5_g_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_g_imp1


m1 <- msm_5_g_MAN_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_g_MAN_imp1

#probability matrix
dt<-  print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( m1 ) , 4 ) )

# label cols, rows:
rownames(dt) = c("Not-Believe God time 0", "Believe God time 0")
colnames(dt) = c("Not-Believe God t+1","Believe God t+1")

#table
dt%>%
 kbl(caption = "Hidden Markov Model: inferred population average Belief in God state change, years 2010-2021")%>%
  kable_material(c("hover"))
```

LaTeX table

```{r, eval = FALSE}
dt %>%
  kbl(booktabs = T,
      format = "latex",
      caption = "Hidden Markov Model: inferred population average belief in God state change, years 2010-2021")
  
```

```{r  hmmchange, fig.cap="Hidden Markov Model reveals religious change within people differs from the society wide-aggregate trend. As people age, they are more likely to affiliate and less likely to disaffiliate. The population gap comes from greater disaffiliation among young people than affiliation.", echo =FALSE}
# Graph

m1 <- msm_5_g_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_g_imp1

m1 <- msm_5_g_MAN_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_g_MAN_imp1

oz<- as.matrix( msm::pmatrix.msm( m1 ) )
oz <- round(oz, digits = 3)
m1
oz
stateNames <- c("No Belief God (.42)","Belief God (.58)") # 10 waves
row.names(oz) <- stateNames; colnames(oz) <- stateNames
oz
## need to transpose or else arrows go in the wrong direction
toz <- t(oz) 

#library(pracma)
plotmat(toz,
       # pos = c(1,2), 
       # lwd = 1, 
       # box.lwd = 2, 
        cex.txt = 0.9, 
        box.size = 0.09, 
       # box.type = "circle", 
        box.prop = 0.5,
        arr.pos =  0.4, 
        shadow.size = 0.001,
        box.col = c("lightgreen","lightblue","orange"),
       # arr.length=.1,
       # arr.width=.1,
        self.cex = .4,
        self.shifty = -.01,
        self.shiftx = .12,
        main = "Hidden Markov Model reveals low transition to Belief in God \nNew Zealand: N = , years 2016-2021")

# god_markov 12 x 9 
```

## Graph

```{r  hmmchange2, cache = TRUE, fig.cap="Hidden Markov Model reveals religious change within people differs from the society wide-aggregate trend. As people age, they are more likely to affiliate and less likely to disaffiliate. The population gap comes from much greater disaffiliation among young people than affiliation.", include = TRUE, code_folding=TRUE}

# note to self, this code can be improved
### CREATE PLOT  ###  CONVERSION AGE PLOT
## 20 year olds

#m1 <-readRDS(here::here( "models","mnm-simpson-paradox-religious-change" ))
m1 <- msm_5_g_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_g_imp1
m1 <- msm_5_g_MAN_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_g_MAN_imp1

p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
p20.Convert <- p20$estimates[1, 2]
p20.Convert.L <- p20$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p20.Convert.U <- p20$U[1, 2]
con.20 <- c(20, p20.Convert, p20.Convert.L, p20.Convert.U)
## 30 year olds
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.Convert <- p30$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p30.Convert.L <- p30$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p30.Convert.U <- p30$U[1, 2]
#combine
con.30 <- c(30, p30.Convert, p30.Convert.L, p30.Convert.U)
## 40 year old
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p40.Convert <- p40$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p40.Convert.L <- p40$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p40.Convert.U <- p40$U[1, 2]
con.40 <- c(40, p40.Convert, p40.Convert.L, p40.Convert.U)
## 50 year old
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p50.Convert <- p50$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p50.Convert.L <- p50$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p50.Convert.U <- p50$U[1, 2]
con.50 <- c(50, p50.Convert, p50.Convert.L, p50.Convert.U)
## 60 year olds
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p60.Convert <- p60$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p60.Convert.L <- p60$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p60.Convert.U <- p60$U[1, 2]
con.60 <- c(60, p60.Convert, p60.Convert.L, p60.Convert.U)
## 70 year olds
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p70.Convert <- p70$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p70.Convert.L <- p70$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p70.Convert.U <- p70$U[1, 2]
con.70 <- c(70, p70.Convert, p70.Convert.L, p70.Convert.U)
### ## 80 year olds
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p80.Convert <- p80$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p80.Convert.L <- p80$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p80.Convert.U <- p80$U[1, 2]
con.80 <- c(80, p80.Convert, p80.Convert.L, p80.Convert.U)
# ### ## 90 year olds
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
# # Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p90.Convert <- p90$estimates[1, 2]
# # set lower bound
p90.Convert.L <- p90$L[1, 2]
p90.Convert.U <- p90$U[1, 2]
con.90 <- c(90, p90.Convert, p90.Convert.L, p90.Convert.U)
# ### create data frame for conversion plot
conplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(con.20, con.30, con.40, con.50, con.60, con.70, con.80, con.90))
colnames(conplot) <-
  c("age", "conv_probability", "conv_lower", "conv_upper")
library(ggplot2)

con.20
con.50

##### CREAT PLOT FOR DECONVERSION
## 20 year olds
p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p20.decon <- p20$estimates[2, 1]
p20.decon.L <- p20$L[2, 1]
p20.decon.U <- p20$U[2, 1]
decon.20 <- c(20, p20.decon, p20.decon.L, p20.decon.U)
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.decon <- p30$estimates[2, 1]
p30.decon.L <- p30$L[2, 1]
p30.decon.U <- p30$U[2, 1]
decon.30 <- c(30, p30.decon, p30.decon.L, p30.decon.U)
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
p40.decon <- p40$estimates[2, 1]
p40.decon.L <- p40$L[2, 1]
p40.decon.U <- p40$U[2, 1]
decon.40 <- c(40, p40.decon, p40.decon.L, p40.decon.U)
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
p50.decon <- p50$estimates[2, 1]
p50.decon.L <- p50$L[2, 1]
p50.decon.U <- p50$U[2, 1]
decon.50 <- c(50, p50.decon, p50.decon.L, p50.decon.U)
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
p60.decon <- p60$estimates[2, 1]
p60.decon.L <- p60$L[2, 1]
p60.decon.U <- p60$U[2, 1]
decon.60 <- c(60, p60.decon, p60.decon.L, p60.decon.U)
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
p70.decon <- p70$estimates[2, 1]
p70.decon.L <- p70$L[2, 1]
p70.decon.U <- p70$U[2, 1]
decon.70 <- c(70, p70.decon, p70.decon.L, p70.decon.U)
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
p80.decon <- p80$estimates[2, 1]
p80.decon.L <- p80$L[2, 1]
p80.decon.U <- p80$U[2, 1]
decon.80 <- c(80, p80.decon, p80.decon.L, p80.decon.U)
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
p90.decon <- p90$estimates[2, 1]
p90.decon.L <- p90$L[2, 1]
p90.decon.U <- p90$U[2, 1]
decon.90 <- c(90, p90.decon, p90.decon.L, p90.decon.U)

### create data frame for conversion plot
deconplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(
    decon.20,
    decon.30,
    decon.40,
    decon.50,
    decon.60,
    decon.70,
    decon.80,
    decon.90
  ))
colnames(deconplot) <-
  c("age", "decon_probability", "decon_lower", "decon_upper")
library(ggplot2)

#library(gridExtra)

#grid.arrange(plot.con,plot.decon, ncol=2)
### SUPERIMPOSE
deconplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Dis-Belief", nrow(deconplot)))
conplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Belief", nrow(conplot)))
deconplot2 <- deconplot %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    conv_probability = decon_probability,
    conv_lower = decon_lower,
    conv_upper = decon_upper
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(decon_probability, decon_upper, decon_lower))

comboplot <- rbind(conplot, deconplot2)
#comboplot
# get initial probabilities for title label
#pmatrix.msm(m1)


library(ggsci )



plot_5_g_30 <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F, 
             method = "gam",
             formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs", fx = TRUE, k = 7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .3))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of Religious (Dis)Belief w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Belief in God Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 21867, years 2016-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_npg() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_5_g_30


plot_5_g_12 <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F, 
             method = "gam",
             formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs", fx = TRUE, k = 7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .12))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of Religious (Dis)Belief w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Belief in God Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 21867, years 2016-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_npg() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")


saveRDS(plot_5_g_12, here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "plot_5_g_12"))
saveRDS(plot_5_g_30, here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "plot_5_g_30"))

### BELIEF IN A SPIRIT

```{r  msm2, cache = TRUE, eval = FALSE}
### MSM ANALYIS BELOW ###
# commenting out model to save time (which I've saved in a file, below)
# initial matrix for transitions
library("msm")

# read data 
a_imp_5_s <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_5_s"))

a_imp_10_s <- readRDS(here::here("_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox","mods", "a_imp_10_s"))


Q0 <- rbind(c(.9, .1),
            c(.1, .9))

# intensity matrix



# Initialise
crudeinR <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(bs1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = a_imp_5_s,
                      qmatrix = Q0)

# model 
msm_5_s_imp1   <- msm(
  bs1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = a_imp_5_s,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
  gen.inits=TRUE,
  ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE
  # Not running without this assumption.
 # gen.inits = TRUE
)

saveRDS(msm_5_s_imp1, here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "msm_5_s_imp1"))


print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( msm_5_s_imp1 ) , 3 ) )


## 10 year 
crudeinR <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(bs1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = a_imp_10_s,
                      qmatrix = Q0)

# model 
msm_10_s_imp1   <- msm(
  bs1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = a_imp_10_s,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
  gen.inits=TRUE,
  ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE
  # Not running without this assumption.
 # gen.inits = TRUE
)

saveRDS(msm_10_s_imp1, here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "msm_10_s_imp1"))


print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( msm_10_s_imp1 ) , 3 ) )




### MANIFEST MODEL SPIRIT

## 5 year 


crudeinR <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(bs1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = a_imp_5_s,
                      qmatrix = Q0)

msm_5_s_MAN_imp1  <- msm(
  bs1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = a_imp_5_s,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
  gen.inits=TRUE,
 # ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE
  # Not running without this assumption.
 # gen.inits = TRUE
)
msm_5_s_MAN_imp1

saveRDS(msm_5_s_MAN_imp1, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_5_s_MAN_imp1" ))
msm_5_s_MAN_imp1 <- readRDS( here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_5_s_MAN_imp1" ))

print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( msm_5_s_MAN_imp1 ) , 3 ) )



## 10 year 


crudeinR <-
  msm::crudeinits.msm(bs1 ~ yearW, Id, # Id = identifier
                      data = a_imp_10_s,
                      qmatrix = Q0)

msm_10_s_MAN_imp1  <- msm(
  bs1 ~ yearW,
  Id,
  data = a_imp_10_s,
  covariates =  ~ Age,
  qmatrix = crudeinR,
  gen.inits=TRUE,
#  ematrix = rbind(c(.1, .1), c(.1, .1)),
  est.initprobs = TRUE,
  exacttimes = TRUE
  # Not running without this assumption.
 # gen.inits = TRUE
)
msm_10_s_MAN_imp1
saveRDS(msm_10_s_MAN_imp1, here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_s_MAN_imp1" ))
msm_10_s_MAN_imp1 <- readRDS( here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_s_MAN_imp1" ))

print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( msm_10_s_MAN_imp1 ) , 3 ) )
```

```{r}
# read model, (saved to save time)

# note change of model name 
# USE IMPUTED
msm_5_s_imp1 <-readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_5_s_imp1" ))
msm_10_s_imp1 <-readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_s_imp1" ))

msm_5_s_MAN_imp1 <- readRDS( here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_5_s_MAN_imp1" ))
msm_10_s_MAN_imp1 <- readRDS( here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","msm_10_s_MAN_imp1" ))



m1 <- msm_10_s_imp1

#probability matrix
dt<-  print( round( msm::pmatrix.msm( m1 ) , 4 ) )

# label cols, rows:
rownames(dt) = c("Not-Believe God time 0", "Believe God time 0")
colnames(dt) = c("Not-Believe God t+1","Believe God t+1")

#table
dt%>%
 kbl(caption = "Hidden Markov Model: inferred population average Belief in God state change, years 2016-2021")%>%
  kable_material(c("hover"))
```

LaTeX table

```{r, eval = FALSE}
dt %>%
  kbl(booktabs = T,
      format = "latex",
      caption = "Hidden Markov Model: inferred population average belief in God state change, years 2016-2021")
  
```

```{r  hmmchange, fig.cap="Hidden Markov Model reveals religious change within people differs from the society wide-aggregate trend. As people age, they are more likely to affiliate and less likely to disaffiliate. The population gap comes from greater disaffiliation among young people than affiliation.", echo =FALSE}
# Graph

m1 <- msm_5_s_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_s_imp1


m1 <- msm_5_s_MAN_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_s_MAN_imp1


oz<- as.matrix( msm::pmatrix.msm( m1 ) )
oz <- round(oz, digits = 3)
m1
oz
stateNames <- c("No Belief Spirit (.70)","Belief Spirit (.30)")
row.names(oz) <- stateNames; colnames(oz) <- stateNames
oz
## need to transpose or else arrows go in the wrong direction
toz <- t(oz) 

length(unique(a_impS$Id))

#library(pracma)
plotmat(toz,
       # pos = c(1,2), 
       # lwd = 1, 
       # box.lwd = 2, 
        cex.txt = 0.9, 
        box.size = 0.09, 
       # box.type = "circle", 
        box.prop = 0.5,
        arr.pos =  0.4, 
        shadow.size = 0.001,
        box.col = c("lightgreen","lightblue","orange"),
       # arr.length=.1,
       # arr.width=.1,
        self.cex = .4,
        self.shifty = -.01,
        self.shiftx = .12,
        main = "Hidden Markov Model reveals low transition to Belief in God \nNew Zealand: N = 21936, years 2016-2021")

# god_markov 12 x 9 
```

## Graph

```{r  hmmchange2, cache = TRUE, fig.cap="Hidden Markov Model reveals religious change within people differs from the society wide-aggregate trend. As people age, they are more likely to affiliate and less likely to disaffiliate. The population gap comes from much greater disaffiliation among young people than affiliation.", include = TRUE, code_folding=TRUE}

# note to self, this code can be improved
### CREATE PLOT  ###  CONVERSION AGE PLOT
## 20 year olds
m1 <- msm_5_s_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_s_imp1

m1 <- msm_5_s_MAN_imp1
m1 <- msm_10_s_MAN_imp1

p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
p20.Convert <- p20$estimates[1, 2]
p20.Convert.L <- p20$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p20.Convert.U <- p20$U[1, 2]
con.20 <- c(20, p20.Convert, p20.Convert.L, p20.Convert.U)
## 30 year olds
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.Convert <- p30$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p30.Convert.L <- p30$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p30.Convert.U <- p30$U[1, 2]
#combine
con.30 <- c(30, p30.Convert, p30.Convert.L, p30.Convert.U)
## 40 year old
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p40.Convert <- p40$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p40.Convert.L <- p40$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p40.Convert.U <- p40$U[1, 2]
con.40 <- c(40, p40.Convert, p40.Convert.L, p40.Convert.U)
## 50 year old
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p50.Convert <- p50$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p50.Convert.L <- p50$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p50.Convert.U <- p50$U[1, 2]
con.50 <- c(50, p50.Convert, p50.Convert.L, p50.Convert.U)
## 60 year olds
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p60.Convert <- p60$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p60.Convert.L <- p60$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p60.Convert.U <- p60$U[1, 2]
con.60 <- c(60, p60.Convert, p60.Convert.L, p60.Convert.U)
## 70 year olds
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p70.Convert <- p70$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p70.Convert.L <- p70$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p70.Convert.U <- p70$U[1, 2]
con.70 <- c(70, p70.Convert, p70.Convert.L, p70.Convert.U)
### ## 80 year olds
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p80.Convert <- p80$estimates[1, 2]
# set lower bound
p80.Convert.L <- p80$L[1, 2]
# get upper bound
p80.Convert.U <- p80$U[1, 2]
con.80 <- c(80, p80.Convert, p80.Convert.L, p80.Convert.U)
# ### ## 90 year olds
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
# # Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p90.Convert <- p90$estimates[1, 2]
# # set lower bound
p90.Convert.L <- p90$L[1, 2]
p90.Convert.U <- p90$U[1, 2]
con.90 <- c(90, p90.Convert, p90.Convert.L, p90.Convert.U)
# ### create data frame for conversion plot
conplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(con.20, con.30, con.40, con.50, con.60, con.70, con.80, con.90))
colnames(conplot) <-
  c("age", "conv_probability", "conv_lower", "conv_upper")
library(ggplot2)


##### CREAT PLOT FOR DECONVERSION
## 20 year olds
p20 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 20), ci = "normal")
# Get Transition to Relid Estimate
p20.decon <- p20$estimates[2, 1]
p20.decon.L <- p20$L[2, 1]
p20.decon.U <- p20$U[2, 1]
decon.20 <- c(20, p20.decon, p20.decon.L, p20.decon.U)
p30 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 30), ci = "normal")
p30.decon <- p30$estimates[2, 1]
p30.decon.L <- p30$L[2, 1]
p30.decon.U <- p30$U[2, 1]
decon.30 <- c(30, p30.decon, p30.decon.L, p30.decon.U)
p40 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 40), ci = "normal")
p40.decon <- p40$estimates[2, 1]
p40.decon.L <- p40$L[2, 1]
p40.decon.U <- p40$U[2, 1]
decon.40 <- c(40, p40.decon, p40.decon.L, p40.decon.U)
p50 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 50), ci = "normal")
p50.decon <- p50$estimates[2, 1]
p50.decon.L <- p50$L[2, 1]
p50.decon.U <- p50$U[2, 1]
decon.50 <- c(50, p50.decon, p50.decon.L, p50.decon.U)
p60 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 60), ci = "normal")
p60.decon <- p60$estimates[2, 1]
p60.decon.L <- p60$L[2, 1]
p60.decon.U <- p60$U[2, 1]
decon.60 <- c(60, p60.decon, p60.decon.L, p60.decon.U)
p70 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 70), ci = "normal")
p70.decon <- p70$estimates[2, 1]
p70.decon.L <- p70$L[2, 1]
p70.decon.U <- p70$U[2, 1]
decon.70 <- c(70, p70.decon, p70.decon.L, p70.decon.U)
p80 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 80), ci = "normal")
p80.decon <- p80$estimates[2, 1]
p80.decon.L <- p80$L[2, 1]
p80.decon.U <- p80$U[2, 1]
decon.80 <- c(80, p80.decon, p80.decon.L, p80.decon.U)
p90 <-
  pmatrix.msm(m1, covariates = list(Age = 90), ci = "normal")
p90.decon <- p90$estimates[2, 1]
p90.decon.L <- p90$L[2, 1]
p90.decon.U <- p90$U[2, 1]
decon.90 <- c(90, p90.decon, p90.decon.L, p90.decon.U)

### create data frame for conversion plot
deconplot <-
  data.frame(rbind(
    decon.20,
    decon.30,
    decon.40,
    decon.50,
    decon.60,
    decon.70,
    decon.80,
    decon.90
  ))
colnames(deconplot) <-
  c("age", "decon_probability", "decon_lower", "decon_upper")
library(ggplot2)


#grid.arrange(plot.con,plot.decon, ncol=2)
### SUPERIMPOSE
deconplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Dis-Belief", nrow(deconplot)))
conplot$Group <- as.factor(rep("Belief", nrow(conplot)))
deconplot2 <- deconplot %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    conv_probability = decon_probability,
    conv_lower = decon_lower,
    conv_upper = decon_upper
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(decon_probability, decon_upper, decon_lower))

comboplot <- rbind(conplot, deconplot2)
#comboplot
# get initial probabilities for title label
#pmatrix.msm(m1)

library(ggplot2)

library("ggokabeito")   # color palette
 

plot_5_s_30 <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .35))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of (Dis)Belief Spirit w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Belief in Spirit Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 21936, years 2016-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_5_s_30 



plot_5_s_12 <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .12))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of (Dis)Belief Spirit w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Belief in Spirit Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 21936, years 2016-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_5_s_12

saveRDS(plot_5_s_12,   here::here(here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "plot_5_s_12")))
saveRDS(plot_5_s_30,   here::here(here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "plot_5_s_30")))

plot_5_s_30 <- readRDS(here::here(here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "plot_5_s_30")))

plot_5_s_30

## 10 year spirit graphs 

plot_10_s_30 <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .35))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of (Dis)Belief Spirit w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Hidden Markov Model: (Dis)Belief in Spirit Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 4441, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +

  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_10_s_30

  geom_smooth(se = F) +

### MANIFEST PLOTS 

## 5 years

plot_5_s_30_man <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F, 
             method = "gam",
             formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs", fx = TRUE, k = 7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .35))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of (Dis)Belief w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Manifest Markov Model: (Dis)Belief in Spirit Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 21867, years 2016-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_5_s_30_man

saveRDS(plot_5_s_30_man, here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "plot_5_s_30_man"))
plot_5_s_30_man <- readRDS(here::here(here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "plot_5_s_30_man")))


## 10 Years 
plot_10_s_30_man <-
  ggplot(
    aes(
      x = age,
      y = conv_probability,
      ymin = conv_lower,
      ymax = conv_upper,
      colour = Group
    ),
    data = comboplot
  ) +
  geom_point(alpha = 1, stroke = 2) +
  geom_linerange(alpha = 1) +
  geom_smooth(se = F, 
             method = "gam",
             formula = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs", fx = TRUE, k = 7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, .35))  +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Annual Probability of (Dis)Belief w/ 95 CI ") + theme_bw() + labs(title = "Manifest Markov Model: (Dis)Belief in God Dynamics in New Zealand",
  subtitle= "N = 4441, years 2010-2021") +
  #scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#E69F00", "#56B4E9")) +
  scale_color_okabe_ito() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

plot_10_s_30_man + plot_10_g_30_man

plot_10_s_30_man + plot_10_s_30

plot_5_s_30_man + plot_5_s_30

plot_10_s_30_man


saveRDS(plot_10_s_30_man, here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "plot_10_s_30_man"))
plot_10_s_30_man <- readRDS(here::here(here::here("_posts", "religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods", "plot_10_s_30_man")))

plot_5_s_30_man  + plot_5_s_30
plot_10_s_30_man  +  plot_10_s_30

plot_5_r_30 + plot_5_g_30  + plot_5_s_30 +   plot_layout(guides = 'collect')

(plot_10_g_12 + plot_5_g_12) /
  (plot_10_s_12 + plot_5_s_12) + 
     plot_layout(guides = 'collect')

## SUmulation

```{r}
library(simstudy)

# May religion 0 to 1 

# IMPUTED 10 YEARS
a_imp_10_r$rel <- a_imp_10_r$Religious1 - 1 
a_imp_10_r$a_s <- scale( a_imp_10_r$Age)
a_imp_10_g$bg <- a_imp_10_g$bg1 - 1
a_imp_10_s$bs <- a_imp_10_s$bs1 - 1
a_imp_10_s$bs 

summary(a_imp_10_r$bg)


library(lme4)

glm1_r <- glmer(rel ~  yearW  + (1|Id) , data = a_imp_10_r, family = binomial ) 


glm1
plogis(-.34901)

parameters::model_parameters(glm1)

library(ggeffects)
library(effects)
p_imp_r  <- plot( ggeffects::ggpredict(glm1, effect = c("yearW [all]")))
p_imp_r
p1_r <- p_imp_r$yearW + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1))
p1_r




glm1_g <- glmer(bg ~  yearW  + (1|Id) , data = a_imp_10_g, family = binomial ) 



parameters::model_parameters(glm1_g)

library(ggeffects)
library(effects)
p_imp_g  <- plot( ggeffects::ggpredict(glm1_g, effect = c("yearW [all]", "a_s [all] ")))
p_imp_g
p1_g <- p_imp_g$yearW + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1))
p1_g


glm1_s <- glmer(bs ~  yearW  + (1|Id) , data = a_imp_10_s, family = binomial ) 



parameters::model_parameters(glm1_g)

library(ggeffects)
library(effects)
p_imp_s  <- plot( ggeffects::ggpredict(glm1_s, effect = c("yearW [all]", "a_s [all] ")))
p_imp_s
p1_s <- p_imp_s$yearW + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1))
p1_s

p1 + p1_g + p1_s


# WITH ATTRITION
all_god_10 <- readRDS(here::here( "_posts","religious_simpsons_paradox", "mods","all_god_10.rds" ))

all_god_10$rel <- all_god_10$Religious1 - 1 
all_god_10$a_s <- scale( all_god_10$Age)
all_god_10$bs <- all_god_10$bs1 - 1
all_god_10$bg <- all_god_10$bg1 - 1

all_god_10$bs

all_god_10$yearW
glm2_r <- glmer(rel ~ yearW   + (1|Id) , data = all_god_10, family = binomial ) 
glm2_g <- glmer(bg ~ yearW   + (1|Id) , data = all_god_10, family = binomial ) 
glm2_s <- glmer(bs ~ yearW   + (1|Id) , data = all_god_10, family = binomial ) 


glm2_r0 <- glm(rel ~ yearW    , data = all_god_10, family = binomial ) 
glm2_g0 <- glm(bg ~ yearW    , data = all_god_10, family = binomial ) 
glm2_s0 <- glm(bs ~ yearW   , data = all_god_10, family = binomial ) 

p_nat_r <- plot( ggeffects::ggpredict(glm2_r, effect = "yearW[all]"))  
p2_r <- p_nat_r$yearW + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1))

p_nat_g <- plot( ggeffects::ggpredict(glm2_g, effect = "bg[all]"))  
p2_g <- p_nat_g$yearW + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1))

p_nat_s <- plot( ggeffects::ggpredict(glm2_s, effect = "bg[all]"))  
p2_s <- p_nat_s$yearW + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1))


p_nat_r0<- plot( ggeffects::ggpredict(glm2_r0, effect = "yearW[all]"))  
p2_r0 <- p_nat_r0$yearW + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1))

p_nat_g0 <- plot( ggeffects::ggpredict(glm2_g0, effect = "bg[all]"))  
p2_g0 <- p_nat_g0$yearW + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1))

p_nat_s0 <- plot( ggeffects::ggpredict(glm2_s0, effect = "bg[all]"))  
p2_s0 <- p_nat_s0$yearW + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1))

(p1 + p1_g + p1_s)/
(p2_r0 + p2_g0 + p2_s0)/
(p2_r + p2_g + p2_s)

plogis( -0.89686  )



parameters::model_parameters(glm2)

library(ggeffects)

p_nat <- plot( ggeffects::ggeffect(glm2, effect = "yearW") ) 
p_nat

library(patchwork)
p_imp$yearW +  p_nat$yearW



table1::table1(~ bs | yearW, data = a_imp_10_s)
table1::table1(~ bs | yearW, data = all_god_10)


```
